Otherwise output only the SQL query with no explanation.

  patients(row_id, subject_id, gender, dod)

  procedures_icd(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, icd_code, charttime)
  labevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, itemid, charttime, valuenum, valueuom)
  chartevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, itemid, charttime, valuenum, valueuom)
  prescriptions(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, starttime, stoptime, drug, dose_val_rx, dose_unit_rx, route)
  icustays(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, first_careunit, last_careunit, intime, outtime)
  transfers(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, transfer_id, eventtype, careunit, intime, outtime)
  microbiologyevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, charttime, spec_type_desc, test_name, org_name)

  outputevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, charttime, itemid, value, valueuom)
  cost(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, event_type, event_id, chargetime, cost)

For patients who were given other endovascular procedures on other vessels in 2100, what are the top four most frequent procedures that followed within 2 months?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'other endovascular procedures on other vessels' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
WITH InitialProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.charttime AS initial_charttime,
        p.icd_code AS initial_icd_code
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'other endovascular procedures on other vessels'
        AND strftime('%Y', p.charttime) = '2100'
),
SubsequentProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        ip.subject_id,
        ip.initial_charttime,
        ip.initial_icd_code,
        sp.icd_code AS subsequent_icd_code,
        sp.charttime AS subsequent_charttime
    FROM 
        InitialProcedures ip
    INNER JOIN 
        procedures_icd sp ON ip.subject_id = sp.subject_id
    WHERE 
        sp.charttime > ip.initial_charttime
        AND datetime(sp.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(ip.initial_charttime) AND datetime(ip.initial_charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        sp.subsequent_icd_code,
        COUNT(*) AS procedure_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        SubsequentProcedures sp
    GROUP BY 
        sp.subsequent_icd_code
)
SELECT 
    dp.long_title
FROM 
    RankedProcedures rp
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_procedures dp ON rp.subsequent_icd_code = dp.icd_code
WHERE 
    rp.rank <= 4;

What are the five commonly taken specimens for patients who received extirpation of matter from left lower lung lobe, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic previously during the same month since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'extirpation of matter from left lower lung lobe, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.subject_id
FROM admissions AS T1
JOIN procedures_icd AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE T2.icd_code = (
    SELECT icd_code 
    FROM d_icd_procedures 
    WHERE long_title = 'extirpation of matter from left lower lung lobe, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic'
)
AND datetime(T2.charttime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year');

Count the number of unique medicines that patient 10026354 was prescribed in 11/this year.

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT drug) FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10026354 ) AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',prescriptions.starttime) = '11'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.drug) AS num_unique_medicines
FROM 
    prescriptions AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    admissions AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T2.subject_id = 10026354
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', T1.starttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-1 month');

What is the percentile of 8.0 in urea nitrogen given the same age as patient 10022017 on their first hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT T1.C1 FROM ( SELECT labevents.valuenum, PERCENT_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY labevents.valuenum ) AS C1 FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'urea nitrogen' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age = ( SELECT admissions.age FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10022017 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) ) AS T1 WHERE T1.valuenum = 8.0

rejected.content:
SELECT age 
FROM admissions 
WHERE subject_id = 10022017 
ORDER BY admittime ASC 
LIMIT 1;

Get patient 10018423's monthly weight information in 2100. If multiple weights are measured monthly, take the minimum.

chosen.content: SELECT MIN(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018423 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y',chartevents.charttime) = '2100' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MIN(chartevents.valuenum) AS min_weight,
    strftime('%Y-%m', chartevents.charttime) AS month_year
FROM 
    chartevents
JOIN 
    d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays ON chartevents.stay_id = icustays.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
JOIN 
    patients ON admissions.subject_id = patients.subject_id
WHERE 
    patients.subject_id = 10018423
    AND d_items.label = 'daily weight'
    AND strftime('%Y', chartevents.charttime) = '2100'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m', chartevents.charttime);

How many patients in 2100 received central venous catheter placement with guidance after the reopening of recent thoracotomy site procedure within the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'reopening of recent thoracotomy site' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'central venous catheter placement with guidance' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month')

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS num_patients
FROM 
    procedures_icd AS T1
JOIN 
    procedures_icd AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'central venous catheter placement with guidance')
    AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'reopening of recent thoracotomy site')
    AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100'
    AND T1.charttime < T2.charttime
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', T2.charttime);

How many hours have passed since the patient 10021487 was admitted to the hospital?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', admissions.admittime) ) FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL

FROM 
    admissions
WHERE 
    subject_id = 10021487 AND dischtime IS NULL;

What does fusion or refusion of 2-3 vertebrae cost?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT cost.cost FROM cost WHERE cost.event_type = 'procedures_icd' AND cost.event_id IN ( SELECT procedures_icd.row_id FROM procedures_icd WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'fusion or refusion of 2-3 vertebrae' ) )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MAX(total_cost) AS max_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.hadm_id,
        SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        cost c ON p.hadm_id = c.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'fusion or refusion of 2-3 vertebrae'
    GROUP BY 
        p.hadm_id
);

Could you show me the daily weight of patient 10039831 since 07/2100? If multiple weights are measured daily, take the average.

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10039831 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-07' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d',chartevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', chartevents.charttime) AS date,
    AVG(chartevents.valuenum) AS avg_weight
FROM 
    chartevents
JOIN 
    d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays ON chartevents.stay_id = icustays.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
WHERE 
    admissions.subject_id = 10039831
    AND d_items.label = 'daily weight'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-07'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', chartevents.charttime);

On last month/20, what was the maximum value of respiratory rate of patient 10019172?

chosen.content: SELECT MAX(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10019172 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-1 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '20'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MAX(T1.valuenum) AS max_respiratory_rate
FROM 
    chartevents T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_items T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE 
    T1.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            T3.stay_id 
        FROM 
            icustays T3
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions T4 ON T3.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            T4.subject_id = 10019172
    )
AND 
    T2.label = 'respiratory rate'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-20', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m-20', 'now', '-1 month');

What is the percentile of 29.0 in a urea nitrogen lab test given the same age as patient 10015931 on the last hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT T1.C1 FROM ( SELECT labevents.valuenum, PERCENT_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY labevents.valuenum ) AS C1 FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'urea nitrogen' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age = ( SELECT admissions.age FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10015931 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) ) AS T1 WHERE T1.valuenum = 29.0

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY T1.valuenum) AS percentile_rank
FROM (
    SELECT 
        labevents.valuenum
    FROM 
        labevents
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems ON labevents.itemid = d_labitems.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_labitems.label = 'urea nitrogen'
        AND labevents.hadm_id = (
            SELECT 
                admissions.hadm_id
            FROM 
                admissions
            WHERE 
                admissions.subject_id = 10015931
                AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY 
                admissions.admittime DESC
            LIMIT 1
        )
) AS T1
WHERE 
    T1.valuenum = 29.0;

Tell me the diagnosis cost of unspecified essential hypertension in a patient?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT cost.cost FROM cost WHERE cost.event_type = 'diagnoses_icd' AND cost.event_id IN ( SELECT diagnoses_icd.row_id FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified essential hypertension' ) )

rejected.content:

    SUM(CASE WHEN c.event_type = 'Diagnosis' THEN c.cost ELSE 0 END) AS diagnosis_cost
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd d
JOIN 
    cost c ON d.hadm_id = c.hadm_id
WHERE 
    d.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'unspecified essential hypertension')
AND 
    d.subject_id = 10018081;

Has patient 10004733 received any tests for triglycerides in 10/last year?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'triglycerides' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10004733 ) AND datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') AND strftime('%m',labevents.charttime) = '10'

WHERE 
    le.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            subject_id = 10004733
    )
AND 
    li.label = 'triglycerides'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', le.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-1 year', '+10 month');

In 2100, how many patients received pantoprazole in the same hospital encounter after being diagnosed with defibrination syndrome?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'defibrination syndrome' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'pantoprazole' AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS patient_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        D.subject_id,
        D.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
        P.charttime AS procedure_time,
        A.hadm_id
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd D
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions A ON D.hadm_id = A.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        procedures_icd P ON D.hadm_id = P.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        D.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'defibrination syndrome')
        AND P.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'pantoprazole')
        AND strftime('%Y', D.charttime) = '2100'
        AND strftime('%Y', P.charttime) = '2100'
        AND D.charttime < P.charttime
) T1;

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10038081 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'blood (toxo)' AND microbiologyevents.org_name IS NOT NULL AND microbiologyevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10038081 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'blood (toxo)' AND microbiologyevents.org_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY microbiologyevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

    INNER JOIN

List the top five most frequent procedures that patients underwent within the same month after being diagnosed with diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, type ii or unspecified type, not stated as uncontrolled in 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, type ii or unspecified type, not stated as uncontrolled' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.long_title
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.icd_code,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            T1.subject_id,
            T1.charttime,
            T2.icd_code
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                admissions.subject_id,
                diagnoses_icd.charttime,
                diagnoses_icd.hadm_id
            FROM diagnoses_icd
            JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
            WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
                SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
                WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, type ii or unspecified type, not stated as uncontrolled'
            )
            AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
        ) AS T1
        JOIN procedures_icd AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
        WHERE datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime, '+1 month')
    ) AS T2
    GROUP BY T2.icd_code
) AS T3
JOIN d_icd_procedures AS T4 ON T3.icd_code = T4.icd_code
WHERE T3.C1 <= 5;

What were the top three most common treatments given to patients in their 40s in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT procedures_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM procedures_icd WHERE procedures_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' GROUP BY procedures_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH RankedProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        p.icd_code,
        COUNT(p.icd_code) AS procedure_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(p.icd_code) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        a.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49
        AND strftime('%Y', p.charttime) = '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        p.icd_code
)
SELECT 
    d.long_title
FROM 
    RankedProcedures rp
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_procedures d ON rp.icd_code = d.icd_code
WHERE 
    rp.rank <= 3;

What's the total amount of d5 1/2ns that patient 10038933 received on 09/26/this year?

chosen.content: SELECT SUM(inputevents.totalamount) FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10038933 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'd5 1/2ns' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND datetime(inputevents.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m-%d',inputevents.starttime) = '09-26'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    SUM(value) AS total_output_amount
FROM 
    outputevents
WHERE 
    stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id
        FROM 
            icustays
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10038933
    )
AND 
    itemid = (
        SELECT 
            itemid
        FROM 
            d_items
        WHERE 
            label = 'd5 1/2ns' AND linksto = 'outputevents'
    )
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', charttime) = '2100-09-26';

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'mrsa screen' AND strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100'

              AND strftime('%Y-%m', me.charttime) >= '2100-05'

    END AS has_mrsa_screen_results;

Among patients who were diagnosed with acute alcoholic intoxication in alcoholism, continuous during this year, what are the top five most commonly prescribed medications that followed in the same hospital encounter for patients in their 50s?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'acute alcoholic intoxication in alcoholism, continuous' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.hadm_id,
        T1.charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'acute alcoholic intoxication in alcoholism, continuous')
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
),
FilteredPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        DP.subject_id,
        DP.hadm_id,
        DP.charttime
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients DP
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions A ON DP.subject_id = A.subject_id
    WHERE 
        A.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
),
PrescribedMedications AS (
    SELECT 
        FP.subject_id,
        FP.hadm_id,
        P.drug,
        P.starttime
    FROM 
        FilteredPatients FP
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions P ON FP.subject_id = P.subject_id AND FP.hadm_id = P.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y', P.starttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
)
SELECT 
    PM.drug,
    COUNT(PM.drug) AS prescription_count
FROM 
    PrescribedMedications PM
GROUP BY 
    PM.drug
ORDER BY 
    prescription_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

Among patients who received percutaneous abdominal drainage throughout this year, what were the top five most common treatments that were administered within 2 months?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'percutaneous abdominal drainage' ) AND datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    p.subject_id,
    pr.charttime AS drainage_charttime
FROM 
    patients p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
JOIN 
    procedures_icd pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
WHERE 
    pr.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'percutaneous abdominal drainage')
    AND strftime('%Y', pr.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now');

Which was the last care unit patient 10007928 was in during their last hospital visit, as per the transfer record?

chosen.content: SELECT transfers.careunit FROM transfers WHERE transfers.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND transfers.careunit IS NOT NULL ORDER BY transfers.intime DESC LIMIT 1

FROM 
    transfers T1
INNER JOIN (

LIMIT 1;

What were the top four most frequent microbiology tests that patients were given after being diagnosed with cerebral aneurysm, nonruptured during the same month in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'cerebral aneurysm, nonruptured' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
WITH CerebralAneurysmDiagnosis AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'cerebral aneurym, nonruptured')
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
),
MicrobiologyTests AS (
    SELECT 
        T2.test_name,
        T2.charttime
    FROM 
        CerebralAneurysmDiagnosis T1
    INNER JOIN 
        microbiologyevents T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T2.charttime > T1.charttime
        AND datetime(T1.charttime, 'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime, 'start of month')
)
SELECT 
    test_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(test_name) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MicrobiologyTests
    GROUP BY 
        test_name
) ranked_tests
WHERE 
    rank <= 4;

What was the last measurement of patient 10020786's height in 07/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020786 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) = '2100-07' AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020786 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) = '2100-07' ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

    T1.valuenum AS height_value
FROM 
    chartevents AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE 
    T1.subject_id = 10020786
    AND T2.label = 'height'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) = '2100-07'
    AND T1.charttime = (
        SELECT MAX(T3.charttime)
        FROM chartevents AS T3
        INNER JOIN d_items AS T4 ON T3.itemid = T4.itemid
        WHERE T3.subject_id = 10020786
          AND T4.label = 'height'
          AND strftime('%Y-%m', T3.charttime) = '2100-07'
    );

What were the three diagnoses with the lowest 3-month survival rate?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T4.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T3.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY T3.C2 ASC ) AS C3 FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, AVG(C1) AS C2 FROM ( SELECT T1.icd_code, ( CASE WHEN strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime) < 1 * 365/4 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) as C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/4 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id ) AS T2 GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 ) AS T4 WHERE T4.C3 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisSurvivalCTE AS (
    -- Step 1: Join the necessary tables and calculate survival status
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN (julianday(T2.dod) - julianday(T1.charttime)) / 30.44 < 3 THEN 0  -- Patient died within 3 months
            ELSE 1  -- Patient survived more than 3 months
        END AS survival_status
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        patients T2 ON T3.subject_id = T2.subject_id
),
DiagnosisSurvivalRateCTE AS (
    -- Step 2: Aggregate the survival statuses to get the average survival rate per diagnosis
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        AVG(survival_status) AS survival_rate
    FROM 
        DiagnosisSurvivalCTE
    GROUP BY 
        icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    -- Step 3: Rank the diagnoses based on their survival rates
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        survival_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY survival_rate ASC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisSurvivalRateCTE
)
-- Step 4: Select the top three diagnoses with the lowest survival rates
SELECT 
    T1.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T2
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T1 ON T2.icd_code = T1.icd_code
WHERE 
    T2.rank <= 3;

List the top five most frequent procedures that patients underwent during the same month after being diagnosed with adverse effect of anticoagulants, initial encounter in 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'adverse effect of anticoagulants, initial encounter' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.subject_id,
    T1.charttime
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd AS T1
JOIN 
    admissions AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'Adverse Effect of Anticoagulants')
AND 
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100';

On last month/17, what was the average of heart rate for patient 10006053?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10006053 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'heart rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-1 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '17'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(T1.valuenum) AS avg_heart_rate
FROM 
    chartevents T1
INNER JOIN 
    icustays T2 ON T1.stay_id = T2.stay_id
INNER JOIN 
    admissions T3 ON T2.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
INNER JOIN 
    d_items T4 ON T1.itemid = T4.itemid
WHERE 
    T3.subject_id = 10006053
AND 
    T4.label = 'heart rate'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', T1.charttime) BETWEEN 
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', 'now', '-1 month') || '-' || strftime('%Y-%m-17', 'now', '-1 month');

Has the or cell saver intake been given to patient 10011398 since 07/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10011398 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'or cell saver intake' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',inputevents.starttime) >= '2100-07'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_or_cell_saver_intake
FROM 
    inputevents ie
JOIN 
    icustays ic ON ie.stay_id = ic.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ad ON ic.hadm_id = ad.hadm_id
WHERE 
    ad.subject_id = 10011398
AND 
    ie.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            di.itemid 
        FROM 
            d_items di 
        WHERE 
            di.label = 'or cell saver intake' AND di.linksto = 'inputevents'
    )
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ie.starttime) >= '2100-07';

What was the name of the drug that patient 10031757 had been prescribed two times in 11/this year?

chosen.content: SELECT T1.drug FROM ( SELECT prescriptions.drug, COUNT( prescriptions.starttime ) AS C1 FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',prescriptions.starttime) = '11' GROUP BY prescriptions.drug ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 = 2

rejected.content:
SELECT p.drug
FROM prescriptions p
JOIN (
    SELECT drug
    FROM prescriptions
    WHERE subject_id = 10031757
      AND strftime('%Y-%m', starttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')
    GROUP BY drug
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) subq ON p.drug = subq.drug
WHERE p.subject_id = 10031757;

What are the four most commonly prescribed drugs for patients who were diagnosed with urinary incontinence, unspecified previously within the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'urinary incontinence, unspecified' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.starttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime,
        T2.drug,
        T2.starttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'urinary incontinence, unspecified')
),
RankedDrugs AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y-%m', charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', starttime)
    GROUP BY 
        drug
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugs
WHERE 
    rank <= 4;

What is the 6-month survival probability for patients living with a other and unspecified angina pectoris diagnosis?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(C1) FROM ( SELECT ( CASE WHEN (strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime)) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other and unspecified angina pectoris' ) AND strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        d.subject_id,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_date
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    JOIN 
        admissions a ON d.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        d.icd_code = 'I20'
),
SurvivalCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        dc.subject_id,
        dc.diagnosis_date,
        p.dod,
        CASE 
            WHEN julianday(p.dod) - julianday(dc.diagnosis_date) > 180 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS survived_6_months
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCTE dc
    LEFT JOIN 
        patients p ON dc.subject_id = p.subject_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(survived_6_months) AS six_month_survival_probability
FROM 
    SurvivalCTE;

Is the value of patient 10021118's body temperature from second measurement on the last ICU visit less than its first measurement on the last ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021118 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'temperature celsius' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021118 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'temperature celsius' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) < ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021118 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'temperature celsius' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021118 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'temperature celsius' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH LastICUStay AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id,
        icustays.intime,
        icustays.outtime
    FROM 
        icustays
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10021118
    ORDER BY 
        icustays.intime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
FirstSecondMeasurements AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.charttime,
        chartevents.valuenum,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY chartevents.charttime) as row_num
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        LastICUStay ON chartevents.stay_id = LastICUStay.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_items.label = 'temperature celsius'
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN row_num = 1 THEN valuenum END) < MAX(CASE WHEN row_num = 2 THEN valuenum END) AS is_second_measurement_less_than_first
FROM 
    FirstSecondMeasurements;

What are the five most frequently prescribed medications for patients in their 40s since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T1.drug FROM ( SELECT prescriptions.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 ) AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) >= '2100' GROUP BY prescriptions.drug ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT T3.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 AND strftime('%Y', prescriptions.starttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime 
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 5;

Since 1 year ago, what are the top five most common drugs prescribed in the same month to male patients aged 50s after being diagnosed with unspecified sinusitis (chronic)?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified sinusitis (chronic)' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.subject_id IN ( SELECT patients.subject_id FROM patients WHERE patients.gender = 'm' ) AND admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.starttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.drug
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.drug,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            diagnoses_icd.charttime,
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            diagnoses_icd
        JOIN 
            admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
                SELECT 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                FROM 
                    d_icd_diagnoses 
                WHERE 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified sinusitis (chronic)'
            )
            AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year')
            AND admissions.gender = 'M'
            AND admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
    ) AS T1
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            prescriptions.drug,
            prescriptions.starttime,
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            prescriptions
        JOIN 
            admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            strftime('%Y', prescriptions.starttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year')
            AND admissions.gender = 'M'
            AND admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
    ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.charttime < T2.starttime
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', T2.starttime)
    GROUP BY 
        T2.drug
) AS T3
WHERE 
    T3.C1 <= 5;

What is the difference between weights on patient 10003046 last measured on the last hospital visit compared to the value first measured on the last hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10003046 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10003046 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) - ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10003046 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10003046 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) );

How many patients since 2100 underwent radical excision of other lymph nodes within the same hospital visit after other repair and plastic operations on bronchus?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'other repair and plastic operations on bronchus' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'radical excision of other lymph nodes' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS count_of_patients
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS lymph_node_charttime,
        T2.charttime AS bronchus_charttime
    FROM diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN procedures_icd T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'radical excision of other lymph nodes')
      AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'other repair and plastic operations on bronchus')
      AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) >= '2100'
      AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) >= '2100'
      AND T2.charttime < T1.charttime
) T1;

What were the four most commonly given diagnoses for patients that had previously received a respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours within 2 months, since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        pr.charttime AS procedure_time
    FROM 
        procedures_icd pr
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions p ON pr.hadm_id = p.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON pr.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'Respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours'
        AND strftime('%Y', pr.charttime) = '2100'
),
DiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_time
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions p ON d.hadm_id = p.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y', d.charttime) = '2100'
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        d.icd_code,
        COUNT(d.subject_id) AS diagnosis_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(d.subject_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCTE d
    INNER JOIN 
        ProcedureCTE p ON d.subject_id = p.subject_id
    WHERE 
        datetime(d.diagnosis_time) BETWEEN datetime(p.procedure_time) AND datetime(p.procedure_time, '+2 month')
    GROUP BY 
        d.icd_code
)
SELECT 
    d.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses rd
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses d ON rd.icd_code = d.icd_code
WHERE 
    rd.rank <= 4;

What are the three commonly taken specimens for patients who received control of epistaxis by anterior nasal packing previously during the same hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'control of epistaxis by anterior nasal packing' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureSpecimensCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T2.spec_type_desc,
        COUNT(*) AS specimen_count
    FROM 
        procedures_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        microbiologyevents T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'Control of epistaxis by anterior nasal packing')
    GROUP BY 
        T2.spec_type_desc
),
RankedSpecimensCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        spec_type_desc,
        specimen_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY specimen_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ProcedureSpecimensCTE
)
SELECT 
    spec_type_desc
FROM 
    RankedSpecimensCTE
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

Among the patients who were prescribed fentanyl citrate, what are the five most frequently prescribed drugs at the same time in this year?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'fentanyl citrate' AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE datetime(T1.starttime) = datetime(T2.starttime) GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT T3.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                                        FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
                                        WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'fentanyl citrate')
          AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', prescriptions.starttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id 
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 5;

Is patient 10021487's diastolic blood pressure ever less than 31.0 since 09/08/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure diastolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.valuenum < 31.0 AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-09-08'

              AND di.label = 'arterial blood pressure diastolic'
              AND ce.valuenum < 31.0
              AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ce.charttime) >= '2100-09-08'
        ) THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_diastolic_bp_less_than_31;

Show me the top five diagnoses that have the highest 6-month mortality rate.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T4.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T3.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY T3.C2 ASC ) AS C3 FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, AVG(C1) AS C2 FROM ( SELECT T1.icd_code, ( CASE WHEN strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) as C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id ) AS T2 GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 ) AS T4 WHERE T4.C3 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisMortalityCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        d.icd_code,
        AVG(CASE 
            WHEN julianday(p.dod) - julianday(d.charttime) < 180 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS mortality_rate
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON d.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        patients p ON a.subject_id = p.subject_id
    GROUP BY 
        d.icd_code
)

    T1.org_name
FROM 
    microbiologyevents AS T1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        admissions.hadm_id
    FROM 
        admissions
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10027602
    ORDER BY 
        admissions.admittime ASC
    LIMIT 1
) AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.spec_type_desc = 'urine'
ORDER BY 
    T1.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

What are the five most common microbiology tests for patients that had previously received introduction of other thrombolytic into peripheral vein, percutaneous approach within the same hospital visit since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'introduction of other thrombolytic into peripheral vein, percutaneous approach' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.spec_type_desc
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.spec_type_desc,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            procedures_icd.charttime
        FROM 
            procedures_icd
        JOIN 
            admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            procedures_icd.icd_code = (
                SELECT 
                    d_icd_procedures.icd_code 
                FROM 
                    d_icd_procedures 
                WHERE 
                    d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'introduction of other thrombolytic into peripheral vein, percutaneous approach'
            )
            AND strftime('%Y', procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc,
            microbiologyevents.charttime
        FROM 
            microbiologyevents
        JOIN 
            admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            strftime('%Y', microbiologyevents.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.charttime < T2.charttime
    GROUP BY 
        T2.spec_type_desc
) AS T3
WHERE 
    T3.C1 <= 5;

Is systolic blood pressure of patient 10027602 last measured on the last ICU visit greater than the first value measured on the last ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) > ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH LastICUStay AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id,
        icustays.intime,
        icustays.outtime
    FROM icustays
    INNER JOIN admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602
    ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
SystolicBloodPressureValues AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.charttime,
        chartevents.valuenum
    FROM chartevents
    INNER JOIN LastICUStay ON chartevents.stay_id = LastICUStay.stay_id
    INNER JOIN d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE d_items.label = 'systolic blood pressure'
)
SELECT 
    MAX(valuenum) > MIN(valuenum) AS is_greater
FROM SystolicBloodPressureValues;

What is the maximum total cost of the hospital visits that included the drug named fenofibrate since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT MAX(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(cost.cost) AS C1 FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT prescriptions.hadm_id FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'fenofibrate' ) AND strftime('%Y',cost.chargetime) >= '2100' GROUP BY cost.hadm_id ) AS T1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MAX(total_cost) AS max_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.hadm_id,
        SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        prescriptions p
    INNER JOIN 
        cost c ON p.hadm_id = c.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.drug = 'fenofibrate'
        AND strftime('%Y', c.chargetime) = '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        p.hadm_id
);

How many people received a introduction of nutritional substance into upper gi, via natural or artificial opening procedure within the same month after they had been diagnosed with postprocedural pneumothorax since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'postprocedural pneumothorax' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'introduction of nutritional substance into upper gi, via natural or artificial opening' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month')

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.subject_id) AS num_patients
FROM 
    patients p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd d ON a.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
JOIN 
    procedures_icd pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
WHERE 
    d.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'Postprocedural pneumothorax')
    AND pr.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'Introduction of nutritional substance into upper GI, via natural or artificial opening')
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', d.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', pr.charttime)
    AND strftime('%Y', d.charttime) >= '2100';

What is the 3-month survival probability for patients living with a asymptomatic human immunodeficiency virus [hiv] infection status diagnosis?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(C1) FROM ( SELECT ( CASE WHEN (strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime)) < 1 * 365/4 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'asymptomatic human immunodeficiency virus [hiv] infection status' ) AND strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/4 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id )

    T1.subject_id,
    T1.charttime AS diagnosis_date
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd T1
JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T2.long_title = 'asymptomatic human immunodeficiency virus [hiv] infection status';

In 03/last year, was the respiratory rate of patient 10020187 ever greater than 12.0?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020187 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.valuenum > 12.0 AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') AND strftime('%m',chartevents.charttime) = '03'

FROM

INNER JOIN

Since 1 year ago, what are the top five most commonly taken specimens for patients in the same hospital encounter after the diagnosis of intestinal infection due to other organism, not elsewhere classified?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'intestinal infection due to other organism, not elsewhere classified' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        d.subject_id,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
        l.spec_type_desc,
        l.charttime AS lab_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON d.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents l ON a.hadm_id = l.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        d.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'intestinal infection due to other organism, not elsewhere classified')
        AND d.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
),
RankedSpecimens AS (
    SELECT 
        spec_type_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients
    WHERE 
        diagnosis_time < lab_charttime
    GROUP BY 
        spec_type_desc
)
SELECT 
    spec_type_desc
FROM 
    RankedSpecimens
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

How many patients received a ultrasonography of superior vena cava, guidance procedure in the same hospital encounter after having a introduction of nutritional substance into upper gi, via natural or artificial opening procedure since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'introduction of nutritional substance into upper gi, via natural or artificial opening' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'ultrasonography of superior vena cava, guidance' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS num_patients
FROM 
    procedures_icd AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    procedures_icd AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'Introduction of Nutritional Substance into Upper GI, via Natural or Artificial Opening')
AND 
    T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'Ultrasonography of Superior Vena Cava, Guidance')
AND 
    T1.charttime < T2.charttime
AND 
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
AND 
    strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100';

Was the mean blood pressure of patient 10014729 ever less than 79.0 on 03/07/this year?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014729 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.valuenum < 79.0 AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m-%d',chartevents.charttime) = '03-07'

    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS result
FROM 
    chartevents ce
JOIN 
    d_items di ON ce.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    ce.subject_id = 10014729
    AND di.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean'
    AND ce.valuenum < 79.0
    AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ce.charttime) = '2023-03-07';

What are the four most frequent drugs that were prescribed to female patients in their 50s during the same hospital encounter after they were diagnosed with unspecified essential hypertension in this year?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified essential hypertension' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.subject_id IN ( SELECT patients.subject_id FROM patients WHERE patients.gender = 'f' ) AND admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
SELECT T3.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        JOIN patients ON admissions.subject_id = patients.subject_id 
        WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
            SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
            FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
            WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified essential hypertension'
        )
        AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
        AND patients.gender = 'F'
        AND patients.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        JOIN patients ON admissions.subject_id = patients.subject_id 
        WHERE patients.gender = 'F'
        AND patients.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime 
    AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id 
    AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime, '+1 month')
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 4;

Can you tell me the last ferritin lab reading for patient 10020740 in 03/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020740 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'ferritin' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',labevents.charttime) = '2100-03' AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020740 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'ferritin' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',labevents.charttime) = '2100-03' ORDER BY labevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )
