What proportion of patients with a diagnosis of spinal stenosis, lumbar region, with neurogenic claudication survive over a 6-month period?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(C1) FROM ( SELECT ( CASE WHEN (strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime)) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'spinal stenosis, lumbar region, with neurogenic claudication' ) AND strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_date,
        p.dod AS death_date
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses di ON d.icd_code = di.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON d.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        patients p ON a.subject_id = p.subject_id
    WHERE 
        di.long_title = 'spinal stenosis, lumbar region, with neurogenic claudication'
),
SurvivalStatus AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        diagnosis_date,
        death_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN julianday(death_date) - julianday(diagnosis_date) > 180 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS survived_6_months
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(survived_6_months) AS REAL) / COUNT(subject_id) AS proportion_survived_6_months
FROM 
    SurvivalStatus;

Please list the three most common procedures carried out this year.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT procedures_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM procedures_icd WHERE datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') GROUP BY procedures_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.long_title,
        COUNT(*) AS procedure_count
    FROM 
        procedures_icd pr
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures p ON pr.icd_code = p.icd_code
    WHERE 
        datetime(pr.charttime, 'start of year') = datetime('now', 'start of year')
    GROUP BY 
        p.long_title
),
RankedProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        long_title,
        procedure_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY procedure_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ProcedureCounts
)
SELECT 
    long_title
FROM 
    RankedProcedures
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

Could you retrieve patient 10005909's monthly weight since 09/2100? If multiple weights are measured monthly, take the average.

    strftime('%Y-%m', ce.charttime) AS month,
    AVG(ce.valuenum) AS avg_weight
FROM 
    chartevents ce
JOIN 
    icustays ic ON ce.stay_id = ic.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ad ON ic.hadm_id = ad.hadm_id
WHERE 
    ad.subject_id = 10005909
    AND ce.itemid IN (
        SELECT di.itemid 
        FROM d_items di 
        WHERE di.label = 'daily weight'
    )
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', ce.charttime) >= '2100-09'

What is the monthly volume of void that patient 10014354 had since 10/06/2100? If multiple void volumes are measured monthly, take the minimum.

chosen.content: SELECT MIN(outputevents.value) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014354 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'void' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',outputevents.charttime) >= '2100-10-06' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m',outputevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', o.charttime) AS month,
    MIN(o.value) AS min_volume
FROM 
    outputevents o
JOIN 
    d_items di ON o.itemid = di.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays i ON o.stay_id = i.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions a ON i.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10014354  
    AND di.label = 'void'  
    AND o.charttime >= '2100-10-06'  
GROUP BY 
    month;

What was the first measurement of patient 10013049's height since 25 months ago?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10013049 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-25 month') AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10013049 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-25 month') ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    ce.valuenum AS height_measurement
FROM 
    chartevents ce
JOIN 
    icustays i ON ce.stay_id = i.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions a ON i.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10013049
AND 
    ce.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            di.itemid 
        FROM 
            d_items di 
        WHERE 
            di.label = 'Height'
    )
AND 
    ce.charttime >= datetime('now', '-25 months')
ORDER BY 
    ce.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

How much is the average total cost of a hospital visit that includes a phosphate lab test?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(cost.cost) AS C1 FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT labevents.hadm_id FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'phosphate' ) ) GROUP BY cost.hadm_id ) AS T1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(total_cost) AS avg_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.hadm_id,
        SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        cost c
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents l ON c.hadm_id = l.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
    WHERE 
        dl.label LIKE '%phosphate%'
    GROUP BY 
        c.hadm_id
) AS T1;

Is the value of mean blood pressure of patient 10031757 second measured on the first ICU visit greater than it is first measured on the first ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) > ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure mean' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH FirstICUVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id,
        icustays.intime
    FROM 
        icustays
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10031757
    ORDER BY 
        icustays.intime ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
DiastolicReadings AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.charttime,
        chartevents.valuenum
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        FirstICUVisit ON chartevents.stay_id = FirstICUVisit.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure diastolic'
    ORDER BY 
        chartevents.charttime ASC
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN charttime = (SELECT MIN(charttime) FROM DiastolicReadings) THEN valuenum END) < 
    MAX(CASE WHEN charttime = (SELECT MIN(charttime) FROM DiastolicReadings OFFSET 1) THEN valuenum END) AS is_greater;

What are the three most commonly ordered lab tests for patients diagnosed with hyperkalemia previously during the same hospital encounter, this year?

chosen.content: SELECT d_labitems.label FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.itemid IN ( SELECT T3.itemid FROM ( SELECT T2.itemid, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hyperkalemia' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, labevents.itemid, labevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM labevents JOIN admissions ON labevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.itemid ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    d_labitems.label
FROM 
    d_labitems
WHERE 
    d_labitems.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            T3.itemid
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                T2.itemid,
                DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    admissions.subject_id,
                    diagnoses_icd.charttime,
                    admissions.hadm_id
                FROM 
                    diagnoses_icd
                JOIN 
                    admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
                WHERE 
                    diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
                        SELECT 
                            d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code
                        FROM 
                            d_icd_diagnoses
                        WHERE 
                            d_icd_diagnoses.long_title LIKE '%hyperkalemia%'
                    )
                    AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime, 'start of year') = datetime('now', 'start of year')
            ) AS T1
            JOIN (
                SELECT 
                    admissions.subject_id,
                    labevents.itemid,
                    labevents.charttime,
                    admissions.hadm_id
                FROM 
                    labevents
                JOIN 
                    admissions ON labevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
                WHERE 
                    datetime(labevents.charttime, 'start of year') = datetime('now', 'start of year')
            ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
            WHERE 
                T1.charttime < T2.charttime
            GROUP BY 
                T2.itemid
        ) AS T3
        WHERE 
            T3.C1 <= 3
    );

Has there been any organism found in the first sputum microbiology test patient 10038999 received?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10038999 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'sputum' AND microbiologyevents.org_name IS NOT NULL AND microbiologyevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10038999 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'sputum' AND microbiologyevents.org_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY microbiologyevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_organism
FROM 
    microbiologyevents me
JOIN 
    admissions ad ON me.hadm_id = ad.hadm_id
WHERE 
    ad.subject_id = 10038999
    AND me.spec_type_desc = 'sputum'
    AND me.org_name IS NOT NULL
    AND strftime('%Y', me.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
ORDER BY 
    me.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

List the top three most frequent diagnoses that were given to patients within the same month after they were diagnosed with other dependence on machines, supplemental oxygen.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other dependence on machines, supplemental oxygen' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH DependenceDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime,
        T1.icd_code AS diagnosis_icd_code
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T2.long_title = 'other dependence on machines, supplemental oxygen'
),
SubsequentDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime,
        T1.icd_code AS diagnosis_icd_code,
        T2.icd_code AS subsequent_icd_code
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        DependenceDiagnosisCTE T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.charttime > T2.diagnosis_charttime
        AND datetime(T1.charttime, 'start of month') = datetime(T2.diagnosis_charttime, 'start of month')
),
DiagnosisCountsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subsequent_icd_code,
        COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        SubsequentDiagnosesCTE T1
    GROUP BY 
        T1.subsequent_icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subsequent_icd_code,
        T1.diagnosis_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCountsCTE T1
)
SELECT 
    T2.long_title AS diagnosis_description
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.subsequent_icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 3;

What was the last recorded height for patient 10006580 during the first hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10006580 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10006580 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.valuenum AS last_height_measurement
FROM chartevents AS T1
JOIN d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE T1.subject_id = 10006580
AND T1.hadm_id = (
    SELECT T3.hadm_id 
    FROM admissions AS T3 
    WHERE T3.subject_id = 10006580 
    ORDER BY T3.admittime ASC 
    LIMIT 1
)
AND T2.label = 'Height'
ORDER BY T1.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10010471 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'thyroid stimulating hormone' ) AND datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',labevents.charttime) = '05' AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10010471 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'thyroid stimulating hormone' ) AND datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',labevents.charttime) = '05' ORDER BY labevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    l.valuenum AS last_thyroid_stimulating_hormone_value,
    l.charttime AS last_test_date
FROM 
    labevents l
JOIN 
    d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
WHERE 
    l.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            a.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions a 
        WHERE 
            a.subject_id = 10010471
    )
AND 
    dl.label = 'thyroid stimulating hormone'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', l.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now') || '-05'
ORDER BY 
    l.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

Can you name the top five diagnoses with the highest 3-month mortality rate?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T4.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T3.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY T3.C2 ASC ) AS C3 FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, AVG(C1) AS C2 FROM ( SELECT T1.icd_code, ( CASE WHEN strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime) < 1 * 365/4 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) as C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/4 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id ) AS T2 GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 ) AS T4 WHERE T4.C3 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisMortalityCTE AS (
    -- Calculate the 3-month mortality rate for each diagnosis
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        AVG(CASE 
            WHEN (julianday(T2.dod) - julianday(T1.charttime)) / 30.44 < 3 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS mortality_rate
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        patients T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    -- Rank the diagnoses based on the mortality rate
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        mortality_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY mortality_rate DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisMortalityCTE
)
-- Select the top five diagnoses
SELECT 
    T2.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 5;

When did patient 10029291 last have a fecal bag event on 03/06/2100?

FROM 
    outputevents o
INNER JOIN 
    icustays i ON o.stay_id = i.stay_id
INNER JOIN 
    admissions a ON i.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10029291
    AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', o.charttime) = '2100-03-06'
ORDER BY 
    o.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

How many patients underwent diagnosis of postprocedural fever within 2 months after being diagnosed with body mass index 35.0-35.9, adult throughout this year?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'body mass index 35.0-35.9, adult' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'postprocedural fever' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month')

rejected.content:
WITH bmi_diagnosis AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.charttime AS bmi_charttime
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T3 ON T2.icd_code = T3.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T3.long_title = 'body mass index 35.0-35.9, adult'
),
postprocedural_fever AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.charttime AS fever_charttime
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T3 ON T2.icd_code = T3.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T3.long_title = 'fever following procedure'
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS patient_count
FROM 
    bmi_diagnosis T1
INNER JOIN 
    postprocedural_fever T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
WHERE 
    T2.fever_charttime BETWEEN T1.bmi_charttime AND DATE(T1.bmi_charttime, '+2 month');

Show me the top three most common diagnoses of patients with age in their 20s.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT diagnoses_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 ) GROUP BY diagnoses_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatientsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        COUNT(T1.icd_code) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T2.age BETWEEN 20 AND 29
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatientsCTE
)
SELECT 
    T1.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T2
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T1 ON T2.icd_code = T1.icd_code
WHERE 
    T2.rank <= 3;

How many patients in 2100 underwent radical excision of other lymph nodes within the same hospital visit after reopening of recent thoracotomy site?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'reopening of recent thoracotomy site' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'radical excision of other lymph nodes' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS patient_count
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd AS T1
JOIN 
    procedures_icd AS T2 
ON 
    T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'reopening of recent thoracotomy site')
    AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'radical excision of other lymph nodes')
    AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100'
    AND T1.charttime < T2.charttime;

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10026255 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10026255 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) < ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10026255 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10026255 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

WITH LastHospitalVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        hadm_id
    FROM 
        admissions
    WHERE 
        subject_id = 10026255 AND dischtime IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY 
        admittime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
LastLabEvents AS (
    SELECT 
        labevents.valuenum,
        labevents.charttime
    FROM 
        labevents
    INNER JOIN 
        LastHospitalVisit ON labevents.hadm_id = LastHospitalVisit.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems ON labevents.itemid = d_labitems.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_labitems.label = 'MCHC'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT valuenum FROM LastLabEvents ORDER BY charttime ASC LIMIT 1) < 
    (SELECT valuenum FROM LastLabEvents ORDER BY charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS is_less;

What were the five most commonly given microbiology tests for patients who had received excision of right internal mammary artery, percutaneous endoscopic approach before in the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'excision of right internal mammary artery, percutaneous endoscopic approach' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

To translate the natural language question into an executable SQLite query, we need to follow these steps:

1. Identify the relevant tables and fields based on the question.
2. Join the necessary tables to get the required data.
3. Filter the records according to the conditions specified in the question.
4. Group the results and rank them to find the top five most common tests.

### Step-by-Step Solution

#### Step 1: Identify Relevant Tables and Fields
- **`procedures_icd`**: Contains the procedure details including `icd_code`.
- **`d_icd_procedures`**: Contains the description of the procedure using `long_title`.
- **`microbiologyevents`**: Contains the details of the microbiology tests performed.
- **`admissions`**: Contains the admission details which will help us filter by the same month.

#### Step 2: Join Necessary Tables
We need to join `procedures_icd`, `d_icd_procedures`, `microbiologyevents`, and `admissions`.

#### Step 3: Apply Filters
- Filter the `procedures_icd` table to include only those records where the procedure is "excision of right internal mammary artery, percutaneous endoscopic approach".
- Ensure the `charttime` of the procedure and the `microbiologyevents` fall within the same month.

#### Step 4: Group and Rank Results
Group the results by `spec_type_desc` and count the occurrences. Use `DENSE_RANK()` to rank the tests based on their frequency.

### Final Query
```sql
SELECT 
    T3.spec_type_desc
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.spec_type_desc,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            procedures_icd.charttime AS procedure_charttime,
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            procedures_icd
        JOIN 
            admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            procedures_icd.icd_code = (
                SELECT 
                    d_icd_procedures.icd_code

chosen.content: SELECT MAX(outputevents.value) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10009035 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'l pleural #1' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) GROUP BY strftime('%Y',outputevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MAX(outputevents.value) AS max_output_value,
    strftime('%Y', outputevents.charttime) AS year
FROM 
    outputevents
JOIN 
    d_items ON outputevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays ON outputevents.stay_id = icustays.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
WHERE 
    admissions.subject_id = 10009035
    AND d_items.label = 'l pleural #1'
GROUP BY 
    year;

What are the three most common microbiology tests for people who were diagnosed with malignant neoplasm of lower third of esophagus earlier in the same hospital encounter, since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'malignant neoplasm of lower third of esophagus' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.test_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.test_name,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            diagnoses_icd.charttime,
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            diagnoses_icd
        JOIN 
            admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
                SELECT 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                FROM 
                    d_icd_diagnoses 
                WHERE 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'malignant neoplasm of lower third of esophagus'
            )
            AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            microbiologyevents.test_name,
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            microbiologyevents
        JOIN 
            admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            strftime('%Y', microbiologyevents.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.charttime < T2.charttime
    GROUP BY 
        T2.test_name
) AS T3
WHERE 
    T3.C1 <= 3;

Can you list the top four most frequent procedures that patients received in the same month after having right heart cardiac catheterization in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'right heart cardiac catheterization' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.long_title
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.long_title,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            T1.subject_id,
            T1.charttime AS procedure_charttime,
            T2.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                P.subject_id,
                P.charttime,
                A.hadm_id
            FROM 
                procedures_icd P
            INNER JOIN 
                admissions A ON P.hadm_id = A.hadm_id
            WHERE 
                P.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'Right Heart Cardiac Catheterization')
                AND strftime('%Y', P.charttime) = '2100'
        ) T1
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT 
                D.subject_id,
                D.charttime,
                A.hadm_id
            FROM 
                diagnoses_icd D
            INNER JOIN 
                admissions A ON D.hadm_id = A.hadm_id
            WHERE 
                D.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'Accidental Cut, Puncture, Perforation or Hemorrhage During Heart Catheterization')
                AND strftime('%Y', D.charttime) = '2100'
        ) T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
        WHERE 
            T1.procedure_charttime < T2.diagnosis_charttime
            AND datetime(T1.procedure_charttime, 'start of month') = datetime(T2.diagnosis_charttime, 'start of month')
    ) T3
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures T4 ON T3.long_title = T4.long_title
    GROUP BY 
        T3.long_title
) T5
WHERE 
    T5.C1 <= 4;

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'extirpation of matter from lung lingula, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

Is SpO2 of patient 10031757 second measured on the first ICU visit greater than the first value measured on the first ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) > ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10031757 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH FirstICUVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id,
        icustays.intime
    FROM 
        icustays
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10031757
    ORDER BY 
        icustays.intime ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
FirstMeasurement AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.valuenum AS first_value
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        FirstICUVisit ON chartevents.stay_id = FirstICUVisit.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry'
    ORDER BY 
        chartevents.charttime ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
SecondMeasurement AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.valuenum AS second_value
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        FirstICUVisit ON chartevents.stay_id = FirstICUVisit.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry'
    ORDER BY 
        chartevents.charttime ASC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SecondMeasurement.second_value > FirstMeasurement.first_value THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS result
FROM 
    FirstMeasurement, SecondMeasurement;

Was patient 10021487 given any dextrose 5% on this month/07?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'dextrose 5%' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND datetime(inputevents.starttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-0 month') AND strftime('%d',inputevents.starttime) = '07'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_dextrose_5_percent
FROM 
    inputevents ie
JOIN 
    d_items di ON ie.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    ie.stay_id IN (
        SELECT icustays.stay_id 
        FROM icustays 
        JOIN admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487
    )
AND 
    di.label = 'dextrose 5%'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', ie.starttime) = '2023-07';

Among patients who were diagnosed with asthma, unspecified type, unspecified since 1 year ago, what are the top three most frequent diagnoses that followed afterwards in the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'asthma, unspecified type, unspecified' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH filtered_diagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.icd_code,
        T2.long_title,
        T1.charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd AS T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses AS T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T2.long_title = 'Asthma, unspecified type, unspecified'
        AND datetime(T1.charttime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year')
),
ranked_diagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.icd_code,
        T2.long_title,
        T1.charttime,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        filtered_diagnoses AS T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        datetime(T2.charttime) > datetime(T1.charttime)
        AND datetime(T2.charttime) <= datetime(T1.charttime, '+1 month')
    GROUP BY 
        T1.subject_id, T2.icd_code, T2.long_title, T1.charttime
)
SELECT 
    long_title
FROM 
    ranked_diagnoses
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

What was the total hospital cost for patient 10025612's stay on their last hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT SUM(cost.cost) FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10025612 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 )

JOIN cost c ON a.hadm_id = c.event_id
WHERE a.subject_id = 10025612

AND a.dischtime = (
    SELECT MAX(a2.dischtime)
    FROM admissions a2
    WHERE a2.subject_id = 10025612
);

Among the patients who were prescribed alprazolam, what are the five most frequently prescribed drugs at the same time in this year?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'alprazolam' AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE datetime(T1.starttime) = datetime(T2.starttime) GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT T3.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'alprazolam')
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE datetime(prescriptions.starttime, 'start of year') = datetime('now', 'start of year')
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id 
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 5;

What is the average amount of the total hospital cost which involves dependence on supplemental oxygen since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(cost.cost) AS C1 FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT diagnoses_icd.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'dependence on supplemental oxygen' ) ) AND strftime('%Y',cost.chargetime) >= '2100' GROUP BY cost.hadm_id ) AS T1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(T1.total_cost) AS average_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(T1.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        cost AS T1
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems AS T3 ON T2.itemid = T3.itemid
    WHERE 
        T3.label LIKE '%supplemental oxygen%' 
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.chargetime) >= '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        T1.hadm_id
) AS T1;

Can you list the top three most frequent procedures that patients received in the same hospital encounter after having reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH TargetProcedureCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.hadm_id
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach'
),
OtherProceduresCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.hadm_id,
        p.icd_code,
        dp.long_title
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        TargetProcedureCTE tp ON p.subject_id = tp.subject_id AND p.hadm_id = tp.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.icd_code != (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach')
),
RankedProceduresCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        op.long_title,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        OtherProceduresCTE op
    GROUP BY 
        op.long_title
)
SELECT 
    rp.long_title
FROM 
    RankedProceduresCTE rp
WHERE 
    rp.rank <= 3;

Since 1 year ago, what are the top four most commonly taken specimens for patients within 2 months after the diagnosis of encounter for immunization?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'encounter for immunization' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisCTE AS (
    -- Select subjects diagnosed with 'encounter for immunization' within the last year
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'encounter for immunization')
        AND T1.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
),
SpecimenCTE AS (
    -- Select specimens taken within 2 months of the diagnosis
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.spec_type_desc,
        T2.charttime AS specimen_charttime
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCTE T1
    INNER JOIN 
        microbiologyevents T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T2.charttime BETWEEN T1.diagnosis_charttime AND DATE(T1.diagnosis_charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedSpecimens AS (
    -- Rank the specimens based on their frequency
    SELECT 
        spec_type_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(spec_type_desc) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        SpecimenCTE
    GROUP BY 
        spec_type_desc
)
-- Select the top four most common specimens
SELECT 
    spec_type_desc
FROM 
    RankedSpecimens
WHERE 
    rank <= 4;

What is the difference between mchc second measured on the last hospital visit compared to the first value measured on the last hospital visit for patient 10007928?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) - ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mchc' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH LastHospitalVisit AS (
    SELECT hadm_id
    FROM admissions
    WHERE subject_id = 10007928 AND dischtime IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY admittime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
MCHCItemID AS (
    SELECT itemid
    FROM d_labitems
    WHERE label = 'MCHC'
),
LastLabEvents AS (
    SELECT valuenum, charttime
    FROM labevents
    WHERE hadm_id = (SELECT hadm_id FROM LastHospitalVisit)
      AND itemid = (SELECT itemid FROM MCHCItemID)
    ORDER BY charttime
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT valuenum FROM LastLabEvents ORDER BY charttime DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) -
    (SELECT valuenum FROM LastLabEvents ORDER BY charttime ASC LIMIT 1) AS mchc_difference;

How many patients received a closed [endoscopic] biopsy of bronchus after the procedure of arterial catheterization during the same hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'arterial catheterization' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'closed [endoscopic] biopsy of bronchus' ) ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS num_patients
FROM 
    procedures_icd AS T1
JOIN 
    procedures_icd AS T2 
ON 
    T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'closed [endoscopic] biopsy of bronchus')
    AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'arterial Catheterization')
    AND T1.charttime > T2.charttime;

What are the three most commonly tested specimens for patients that were diagnosed with secondary diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, not stated as uncontrolled, or unspecified previously in the same month, since 1 year ago?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.spec_type_desc FROM ( SELECT T2.spec_type_desc, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'secondary diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, not stated as uncontrolled, or unspecified' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.spec_type_desc ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime,
        T2.spec_type_desc,
        T2.charttime AS test_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        microbiologyevents T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'secondary diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, not stated as uncontrolled, or unspecified')
        AND T1.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
        AND T2.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
),
RankedSpecimens AS (
    SELECT 
        spec_type_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(spec_type_desc) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCTE
    WHERE 
        diagnosis_charttime < test_charttime
        AND STRFTIME('%Y-%m', diagnosis_charttime) = STRFTIME('%Y-%m', test_charttime)
    GROUP BY 
        spec_type_desc
)
SELECT 
    spec_type_desc
FROM 
    RankedSpecimens
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

How long has it been in hours since the first time ciprofloxacin iv was prescribed to patient 10018081 on the current hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', prescriptions.starttime) ) FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018081 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) AND prescriptions.drug = 'ciprofloxacin iv' ORDER BY prescriptions.starttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    24 * (strftime('%s', 'now') - strftime('%s', T1.starttime)) / 3600 AS hours_since_first_prescription
FROM (
    SELECT 
        prescriptions.starttime
    FROM 
        prescriptions
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10018081
        AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL
        AND prescriptions.drug = 'ciprofloxacin iv'
    ORDER BY 
        prescriptions.starttime ASC
    LIMIT 1
) AS T1;

How much does patient 10014729 change in mch last measured on the last hospital visit compared to the second to last value measured on the last hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014729 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mch' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014729 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mch' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) - ( SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014729 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mch' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10014729 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'mch' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    (SELECT T1.valuenum 
     FROM chartevents AS T1 
     INNER JOIN d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid 
     INNER JOIN icustays AS T3 ON T1.stay_id = T3.stay_id 
     INNER JOIN admissions AS T4 ON T3.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id 
     WHERE T4.subject_id = 10014729 
       AND T2.label = 'mch' 
       AND T4.dischtime IS NOT NULL 
     ORDER BY T1.charttime DESC 
     LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT T1.valuenum 
     FROM chartevents AS T1 
     INNER JOIN d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid 
     INNER JOIN icustays AS T3 ON T1.stay_id = T3.stay_id 
     INNER JOIN admissions AS T4 ON T3.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id 
     WHERE T4.subject_id = 10014729 
       AND T2.label = 'mch' 
       AND T4.dischtime IS NOT NULL 
     ORDER BY T1.charttime DESC 
     LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS weight_difference;

How many hours have passed since patient 10004733 stayed in the careunit medicine on this hospital visit for the first time?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', transfers.intime) ) FROM transfers WHERE transfers.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10004733 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) AND transfers.careunit = 'medicine' ORDER BY transfers.intime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    (strftime('%s', 'now') - strftime('%s', MIN(transfers.intime))) / 3600 AS hours_since_first_stay
FROM 
    transfers
WHERE 
    transfers.subject_id = 10004733
    AND transfers.careunit = 'medicine'
    AND transfers.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.hadm_id
        FROM 
            admissions
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10004733
            AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL
    );

How many hours were there since patient 10021487 was first diagnosed with injury to other intra-abdominal organs without mention of open wound into cavity, peritoneum in their current hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', diagnoses_icd.charttime) ) FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'injury to other intra-abdominal organs without mention of open wound into cavity, peritoneum' ) AND diagnoses_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) ORDER BY diagnoses_icd.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    24 * (strftime('%s', 'now') - strftime('%s', T1.charttime)) / 3600 AS hours_since_diagnosis
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses AS T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T2.long_title = 'injury to other intra-abdominal organs without mention of open wound into cavity, peritoneum'
AND 
    T1.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            subject_id = 10021487 
        AND 
            dischtime IS NULL
    )
ORDER BY 
    T1.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Show me the top five most commonly prescribed drugs within 2 months for patients in their 60 or above after a thrombocytopenia, unspecified diagnosis since 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'thrombocytopenia, unspecified' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.age >= 60 AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
        T2.drug,
        T2.starttime AS prescription_time
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T3.age >= 60
        AND T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'thrombocytopenia, unspecified')
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) >= '2100'
        AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedDrugs AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients
    GROUP BY 
        drug
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugs
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

Find the number of patients who had a right heart cardiac catheterization procedure in the last year.

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT admissions.subject_id ) FROM admissions WHERE admissions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT procedures_icd.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'right heart cardiac catheterization' ) AND datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-1 year') )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T2.subject_id) AS num_patients
FROM 
    procedures_icd AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    admissions AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
AND 
    T1.icd_code = (
        SELECT 
            icd_code 
        FROM 
            d_icd_procedures 
        WHERE 
            long_title = 'right heart cardiac catheterization'
    );

For patients who had hemodialysis, what were the most frequent four microbiology tests carried out during the same hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'hemodialysis' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.test_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.test_name,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            T1.subject_id,
            T1.hadm_id,
            T1.charttime AS procedure_charttime,
            T2.subject_id AS microbe_subject_id,
            T2.hadm_id AS microbe_hadm_id,
            T2.charttime AS microbe_charttime,
            T2.test_name
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                P.subject_id,
                P.hadm_id,
                P.charttime
            FROM diagnoses_icd P
            INNER JOIN admissions A ON P.hadm_id = A.hadm_id
            WHERE P.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'hemodialysis')
        ) T1
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT 
                M.subject_id,
                M.hadm_id,
                M.charttime,
                M.test_name
            FROM microbiologyevents M
            INNER JOIN admissions A ON M.hadm_id = A.hadm_id
        ) T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
        WHERE T1.procedure_charttime < T2.microbe_charttime
    ) T3
    GROUP BY T3.test_name
) T4
WHERE T4.C1 <= 4;

What proportion of patients with a diagnosis of acetonuria survive over a 6-month period?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(C1) FROM ( SELECT ( CASE WHEN (strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime)) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'acetonuria' ) AND strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id )

rejected.content:
WITH AcetonuriaDiagnoses AS (
    -- Select patients with acetonuria diagnosis
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_date,
        p.dod AS death_date
    FROM 
        patients p
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd d ON p.subject_id = d.subject_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses dd ON d.icd_code = dd.icd_code
    WHERE 
        dd.long_title LIKE '%Acetonuria%'
),
SurvivalStatus AS (
    -- Determine if each patient survived for more than 6 months
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_date,
        death_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN julianday(death_date) - julianday(diagnosis_date) > 180 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS survived_6_months
    FROM 
        AcetonuriaDiagnoses
)
-- Compute the proportion of patients surviving over 6 months
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(survived_6_months) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS survival_rate
FROM 
    SurvivalStatus;

Can you name the top three diagnoses with the highest 6-month mortality rate?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T4.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T3.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY T3.C2 ASC ) AS C3 FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, AVG(C1) AS C2 FROM ( SELECT T1.icd_code, ( CASE WHEN strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) as C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id ) AS T2 GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 ) AS T4 WHERE T4.C3 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisMortalityCTE AS (
    -- Calculate the 6-month mortality rate for each diagnosis
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        AVG(CASE 
            WHEN (julianday(T2.dod) - julianday(T1.charttime)) / 365.25 < 0.5 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS mortality_rate
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        patients T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    -- Rank the diagnoses based on the mortality rate
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        mortality_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY mortality_rate DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisMortalityCTE
)
-- Select the top three diagnoses
SELECT 
    T2.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 3;

How many patients died during the same hospital encounter after having been diagnosed in 2100 with varices of other sites?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T2.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT T1.subject_id, T1.charttime, T1.hadm_id FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'varices of other sites' ) ) AS T1 GROUP BY T1.subject_id HAVING MIN(T1.charttime) = T1.charttime AND strftime('%Y',T1.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 JOIN ( SELECT patients.subject_id, admissions.hadm_id, patients.dod FROM admissions join patients ON patients.subject_id = admissions.subject_id WHERE patients.dod IS NOT NULL AND strftime('%Y',patients.dod) = '2100' ) as T3 ON T2.subject_id = T3.subject_id WHERE T2.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS num_patients_died
FROM 
    admissions T1
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'varices of other sites')
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100'
    AND T1.dischtime IS NOT NULL
    AND T1.subject_id IN (
        SELECT T3.subject_id
        FROM patients T3
        WHERE T3.dod BETWEEN T1.admittime AND T1.dischtime
    );

    SELECT icd_code 
    FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
    WHERE long_title = 'sleep apnea, unspecified'
) AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100';

Among patients who were diagnosed with unspecified viral hepatitis c without hepatic coma during this year, what were the top three most common diagnoses that followed within 2 months?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'unspecified viral hepatitis c without hepatic coma' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH InitialDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS initial_charttime,
        T2.icd_code AS initial_icd_code
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T2.long_title = 'unspecified viral hepatitis c without hepatic coma'
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
),
SubsequentDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.initial_icd_code,
        T2.icd_code AS subsequent_icd_code,
        T2.charttime AS subsequent_charttime
    FROM 
        InitialDiagnosisCTE T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T2.charttime > T1.initial_charttime
        AND T2.charttime <= datetime(T1.initial_charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T2.icd_code,
        T2.long_title,
        COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        SubsequentDiagnosisCTE T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.subsequent_icd_code = T2.icd_code
    GROUP BY 
        T2.icd_code, T2.long_title
)
SELECT 
    long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;
