Give me the top five most commonly prescribed medications within 2 months to the patients aged 40s after they were diagnosed with constipation, unspecified.

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'constipation, unspecified' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_time
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'constipation, unspecified')
        AND T2.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49
),
PrescribedDrugs AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.drug,
        T2.starttime AS prescription_time
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients T1
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T2.starttime > T1.diagnosis_time
        AND T2.starttime <= DATE(T1.diagnosis_time, '+2 month')
),
DrugFrequency AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS frequency
    FROM 
        PrescribedDrugs
    GROUP BY 
        drug
),
RankedDrugs AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        frequency,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY frequency DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DrugFrequency
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugs
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

What was the last height record for patient 10011398 since 12/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10011398 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-12' AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10011398 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-12' ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT 
    T1.valuenum AS height_value,
    T1.valueuom AS height_unit,
    T1.charttime AS measurement_time
FROM 
    chartevents AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE 
    T2.label = 'height'
    AND T1.charttime >= '2100-12-01'
ORDER BY 
    T1.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

What are the top three most common diagnoses that patients had within 2 months after receiving injection of anesthetic into spinal canal for analgesia this year?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'injection of anesthetic into spinal canal for analgesia' ) AND datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.charttime AS procedure_charttime,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd d ON p.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'Injection of anesthetic into spinal canal for analgesia'
        AND strftime('%Y', p.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
        AND d.charttime BETWEEN p.charttime AND datetime(p.charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ProcedureDiagnosisCTE
    GROUP BY 
        icd_code
)
SELECT 
    d.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE r
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses d ON r.icd_code = d.icd_code
WHERE 
    r.rank <= 3;

Tell me the top four most frequent diagnoses of patients of age 40s.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT diagnoses_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 ) GROUP BY diagnoses_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        COUNT(T1.icd_code) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T2.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCounts
)
SELECT 
    T2.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 4;

Calculate the total number of patients diagnosed with other and unspecified anti-infectives causing adverse effects in therapeutic use who didn't revisit the hospital within the same month since 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other and unspecified anti-infectives causing adverse effects in therapeutic use' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 ) - ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T2.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other and unspecified anti-infectives causing adverse effects in therapeutic use' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 JOIN admissions ON T2.subject_id = admissions.subject_id WHERE T2.charttime < admissions.admittime AND strftime('%Y',admissions.admittime) >= '2100' AND datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(admissions.admittime,'start of month') )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS total_patients
FROM 
    admissions AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T2.icd_code = (
        SELECT 
            d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
        FROM 
            d_icd_diagnoses 
        WHERE 
            d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other and unspecified anti-infectives causing adverse effects in therapeutic use'
    )
AND 
    strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100'
AND 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 
            1 
        FROM 
            admissions AS T3
        INNER JOIN 
            diagnoses_icd AS T4 ON T3.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            T3.subject_id = T1.subject_id
        AND 
            T4.icd_code != (
                SELECT 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                FROM 
                    d_icd_diagnoses 
                WHERE 
                    d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other and unspecified anti-infectives causing adverse effects in therapeutic use'
            )
        AND 
            strftime('%Y-%m', T4.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', T2.charttime)
    );

How long has it been in hours since the first time calcium carbonate was prescribed to patient 10021487 during the current hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', prescriptions.starttime) ) FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) AND prescriptions.drug = 'calcium carbonate' ORDER BY prescriptions.starttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
WITH CurrentAdmission AS (
    SELECT hadm_id 
    FROM admissions 
    WHERE subject_id = 10021487 AND dischtime IS NULL
),
FirstPrescriptionTime AS (
    SELECT MIN(starttime) AS first_prescription_time
    FROM prescriptions p
    JOIN CurrentAdmission ca ON p.hadm_id = ca.hadm_id
    WHERE p.drug = 'calcium carbonate'
)
SELECT 
    CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(fpt.first_prescription_time)) * 24 AS INTEGER) AS hours_since_first_prescription
FROM FirstPrescriptionTime fpt;

Has there been any mrsa screen microbiology test result for patient 10003046 throughout this year?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10003046 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'mrsa screen' AND datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year')

    admissions ON admissions.hadm_id = microbiologyevents.hadm_id

    admissions.subject_id = 10003046
    AND strftime('%Y', microbiologyevents.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
    AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'mrsa screen'
    AND microbiologyevents.org_name IS NOT NULL;

Among patients who received reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach during this year, what were the top four most common treatments that were administered within the same hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach' ) AND datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.icd_code, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(procedures_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    p.subject_id
FROM 
    patients p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
JOIN 
    procedures_icd pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_icd_procedures dp ON pr.icd_code = dp.icd_code
WHERE 
    dp.long_title = 'reposition left maxilla with external fixation device, percutaneous approach'
    AND strftime('%Y', pr.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(outputevents.value) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10019172 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'chest tube #1' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',outputevents.charttime) >= '2100-09' GROUP BY strftime('%Y',outputevents.charttime)

    AVG(o.value) AS avg_output_volume
FROM

JOIN 
    d_items i ON o.itemid = i.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays ic ON o.stay_id = ic.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions a ON ic.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10019172  
    AND i.label = 'chest tube #1'  
    AND o.charttime >= '2100-09-01'  
GROUP BY 
    year;

What were the top five most common treatments given to patients in their 60 or above since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_procedures.long_title FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT procedures_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM procedures_icd WHERE procedures_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age >= 60 ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' GROUP BY procedures_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.long_title
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.icd_code,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(T2.icd_code) DESC) AS C1
    FROM 
        procedures_icd AS T2
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions AS T3 ON T2.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T3.age >= 60 AND strftime('%Y', T2.charttime) = '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        T2.icd_code
) AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_procedures AS T4 ON T1.icd_code = T4.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.C1 <= 5;

List the top five most common diagnoses for patients in their 20s throughout this year.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T1.icd_code FROM ( SELECT diagnoses_icd.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') GROUP BY diagnoses_icd.icd_code ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisCountsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        COUNT(T1.icd_code) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T2.age BETWEEN 20 AND 29
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnosesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCountsCTE
)
SELECT 
    T2.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnosesCTE T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 5;

For patients who underwent respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours since 2100, what were the five most common diagnoses during the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5 )

rejected.content:
WITH VentilationProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        pr.charttime AS procedure_time,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_time
    FROM 
        admissions p
    INNER JOIN 
        procedures_icd pr ON p.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd d ON p.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        pr.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'respiratory ventilation, 24-96 consecutive hours')
        AND strftime('%Y', pr.charttime) = '2100'
),
DiagnosisCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        VentilationProcedures
    WHERE 
        diagnosis_time BETWEEN procedure_time AND datetime(procedure_time, '+1 month')
    GROUP BY 
        icd_code
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCounts
)
SELECT 
    d.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses rd
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses d ON rd.icd_code = d.icd_code
WHERE 
    rd.rank <= 5;

Get patient 10039831's yearly weight information since 08/2100. If multiple weights are measured yearly, take the minimum.

chosen.content: SELECT MIN(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10039831 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-08' GROUP BY strftime('%Y',chartevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MIN(T1.valuenum) AS min_weight,
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) AS year
FROM 
    chartevents AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    icustays AS T2 ON T1.stay_id = T2.stay_id
INNER JOIN 
    admissions AS T3 ON T2.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T3.subject_id = 10039831
AND 
    T1.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            itemid 
        FROM 
            d_items 
        WHERE 
            label = 'daily weight'
    )
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) >= '2100-08'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime);

What was the last rbc, ascites lab test result for patient 10005866 in their last hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10005866 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'rbc, ascites' ) AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10005866 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'rbc, ascites' ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

    l.valuenum AS last_rbc_ascites_value,
    l.charttime AS last_test_time
FROM 
    labevents l
JOIN 
    d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
WHERE 
    l.hadm_id = (
        SELECT 
            hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            subject_id = 10005866 
        ORDER BY 
            dischtime DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
AND 
    dl.label = 'rbc, ascites'
ORDER BY 
    l.charttime DESC

What is the daily dose of packed red blood cells given to patient 10008454 in 12/2100? If multiple packed red blood cells doses are measured daily, take the average.

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(inputevents.totalamount) FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10008454 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'packed red blood cells' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',inputevents.starttime) = '2100-12' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d',inputevents.starttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ie.starttime) AS date,
    AVG(ie.totalamount) AS avg_totalamount
FROM 
    inputevents ie
JOIN 
    d_items di ON ie.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    ie.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id 
        FROM 
            icustays 
        JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10008454
    )
    AND di.label = 'packed red blood cells'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', ie.starttime) = '2100-12'
GROUP BY 
    date;

Among patients diagnosed with essential and other specified forms of tremor, what were the top four most common lab tests that followed during the same month throughout this year?

chosen.content: SELECT d_labitems.label FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.itemid IN ( SELECT T3.itemid FROM ( SELECT T2.itemid, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'essential and other specified forms of tremor' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, labevents.itemid, labevents.charttime FROM labevents JOIN admissions ON labevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.itemid ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 4 )

rejected.content:
WITH tremor_diagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime,
        T2.itemid AS lab_itemid,
        T2.charttime AS lab_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code IN (
            SELECT icd_code 
            FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
            WHERE long_title LIKE '%tremor%'
        )
        AND datetime(T1.charttime, 'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime, 'start of month')
        AND T1.charttime < T2.charttime
),
ranked_tests AS (
    SELECT 
        lab_itemid,
        COUNT(*) AS test_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        tremor_diagnoses
    GROUP BY 
        lab_itemid
)
SELECT 
    T1.label
FROM 
    ranked_tests T2
INNER JOIN 
    d_labitems T1 ON T2.lab_itemid = T1.itemid
WHERE 
    T2.rank <= 4;

            long_title = 'excision of dental lesion of jaw'

AND

Following the diagnosis of other abnormal blood chemistry , how many patients developed autistic disorder, current or active state within the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other abnormal blood chemistry' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'autistic disorder, current or active state' ) ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month')

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS count_of_patients
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS abnormal_blood_chemistry_charttime,
        T2.charttime AS autistic_disorder_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'other abnormal blood chemistry')
        AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'autistic disorder, current or active state')
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', T2.charttime)
) T1;

Has patient 10027445 had any results of his or her mrsa screen microbiology tests in 09/this year?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027445 ) AND microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'mrsa screen' AND datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',microbiologyevents.charttime) = '09'

    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS has_mrsa_screen_results
FROM 
    microbiologyevents me
JOIN 
    admissions ad ON me.hadm_id = ad.hadm_id
WHERE 
    ad.subject_id = 10027445
    AND me.spec_type_desc = 'mrsa screen'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', me.charttime) = strftime('%Y-09', 'now')
    AND me.org_name IS NOT NULL;

How much does patient 10018423 change in systolic blood pressure last measured on the last ICU visit compared to the first value measured on the last ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018423 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018423 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) - ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018423 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018423 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
WITH LastICUStay AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id,
        icustays.intime,
        icustays.outtime
    FROM 
        icustays
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10018423
    ORDER BY 
        icustays.intime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
SystolicBloodPressure AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.charttime,
        chartevents.valuenum
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        LastICUStay ON chartevents.stay_id = LastICUStay.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure systolic'
)
SELECT 
    MAX(valuenum) - MIN(valuenum) AS systolic_bp_difference
FROM 
    SystolicBloodPressure;

Show me the top four most common microbiology tests since 1 year ago.

chosen.content: SELECT T1.test_name FROM ( SELECT microbiologyevents.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') GROUP BY microbiologyevents.test_name ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
WITH TestCounts AS (
    -- Count occurrences of each test name since 1 year ago
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        COUNT(*) AS test_count
    FROM 
        microbiologyevents
    WHERE 
        datetime(charttime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year')
    GROUP BY 
        test_name
),
RankedTests AS (
    -- Rank the tests based on their counts
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        test_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY test_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        TestCounts
)
-- Select the top 4 ranked tests
SELECT 
    test_name
FROM 
    RankedTests
WHERE 
    rank <= 4;

What was the last measured value of respiratory rate of patient 10027602 on this month/04?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-0 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '04' AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-0 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '04' ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT 
    ce.valuenum AS last_respiratory_rate_value
FROM 
    chartevents ce
JOIN 
    icustays ic ON ce.stay_id = ic.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ad ON ic.hadm_id = ad.hadm_id
WHERE 
    ad.subject_id = 10027602
    AND ce.itemid = (SELECT itemid FROM d_items WHERE label = 'respiratory rate')
    AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ce.charttime) LIKE '%-04-%'
ORDER BY 
    ce.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

Could you show me the top five most common diagnoses since 2100?

    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        COUNT(T1.icd_code) AS diagnosis_count
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) >= '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        icd_code,
        diagnosis_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosisCounts
)
SELECT 
    T2.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 5;

What is the average daily number of patients who had embolism and thrombosis of other specified artery in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT diagnoses_icd.hadm_id ) AS C1 FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'embolism and thrombosis of other specified artery' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d',diagnoses_icd.charttime) ) AS T1

    AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id)) OVER () AS avg_daily_admissions
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        DATE(T1.charttime) AS diagnosis_date
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd AS T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses AS T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T2.long_title = 'embolism and thrombosis of other specified artery'
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        T1.subject_id, diagnosis_date
) AS T1;

What is patient 10029291's difference in weight from the second value measured on the first hospital visit compared to the first value measured on the first hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10029291 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10029291 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) ) - ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10029291 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10029291 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) );

WITH FirstAdmission AS (
    SELECT 
        a.hadm_id,
        a.stay_id
    FROM admissions a
    JOIN patients p ON a.subject_id = p.subject_id
    WHERE p.subject_id = 10029291
    ORDER BY a.admittime ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
FirstWeights AS (
    SELECT 
        ce.charttime,
        ce.valuenum
    FROM chartevents ce
    JOIN FirstAdmission fa ON ce.stay_id = fa.stay_id
    JOIN d_items di ON ce.itemid = di.itemid
    WHERE di.label = 'daily weight'
    ORDER BY ce.charttime ASC
    LIMIT 2
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT valuenum FROM FirstWeights ORDER BY charttime ASC LIMIT 1) -
    (SELECT valuenum FROM FirstWeights ORDER BY charttime ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS weight_difference;

Can you tell me the output that patient 10035185 had for the last occurrence since 01/16/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT d_items.label FROM d_items WHERE d_items.itemid IN ( SELECT outputevents.itemid FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10035185 ) ) AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',outputevents.charttime) >= '2100-01-16' AND outputevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT outputevents.charttime FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10035185 ) ) AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',outputevents.charttime) >= '2100-01-16' ORDER BY outputevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) )

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.label 
FROM d_items AS T1 
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT T2.itemid 
    FROM outputevents AS T2 
    INNER JOIN icustays AS T3 ON T2.stay_id = T3.stay_id 
    INNER JOIN admissions AS T4 ON T3.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id 
    WHERE T4.subject_id = 10035185 
      AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', T2.charttime) >= '2100-01-16'
    ORDER BY T2.charttime DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) AS T5 ON T1.itemid = T5.itemid;

Among patients who were prescribed with phenytoin infatab, what are the top five most frequently prescribed drugs at the same time in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'phenytoin infatab' AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE datetime(T1.starttime) = datetime(T2.starttime) GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH PhenytoinPatients AS (
    -- Find patients who were prescribed phenytoin infatab in 2100
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        pr.hadm_id
    FROM 
        patients p
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        pr.drug = 'Phenytoin Infatab'
        AND strftime('%Y', pr.starttime) = '2100'
),
OtherPrescriptions AS (
    -- Find other prescriptions for these patients during the same encounter
    SELECT 
        pp.subject_id,
        pp.hadm_id,
        pr.drug
    FROM 
        PhenytoinPatients pp
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions pr ON pp.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        pr.drug != 'Phenytoin Infatab'
        AND strftime('%Y', pr.starttime) = '2100'
),
DrugCounts AS (
    -- Count occurrences of each drug
    SELECT 
        op.drug,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM 
        OtherPrescriptions op
    GROUP BY 
        op.drug
),
RankedDrugs AS (
    -- Rank drugs by frequency
    SELECT 
        dc.drug,
        dc.count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY dc.count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DrugCounts dc
)
-- Select top five drugs
SELECT 
    rd.drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugs rd
WHERE 
    rd.rank <= 5;

What number of hours have passed since patient 10021487 first received a ntprobnp lab test during the current hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', labevents.charttime) ) FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'ntprobnp' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    24 * (strftime('%s', 'now') - strftime('%s', labevents.charttime)) / 3600 AS hours_since_test
FROM 
    labevents
WHERE 
    labevents.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            d_labitems.itemid 
        FROM 
            d_labitems 
        WHERE 
            d_labitems.label = 'ntprobnp'
    )
AND 
    labevents.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10021487 
            AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL
    )
ORDER BY 
    labevents.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Calculate the number of patients who stayed in the med/surg this year.

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT admissions.subject_id ) FROM admissions WHERE admissions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT transfers.hadm_id FROM transfers WHERE transfers.careunit = 'med/surg' AND datetime(transfers.intime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') )

rejected.content:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) 
FROM admissions AS T1 
INNER JOIN transfers AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id 
WHERE T2.careunit = 'Med/Surg' 
AND strftime('%Y', T2.intime) = strftime('%Y', 'now');

Count the number of patients who were diagnosed with irritable bowel syndrome but didn't come back to the hospital within 2 months since 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'irritable bowel syndrome' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 ) - ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T2.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'irritable bowel syndrome' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 JOIN admissions ON T2.subject_id = admissions.subject_id WHERE T2.charttime < admissions.admittime AND strftime('%Y',admissions.admittime) >= '2100' AND datetime(admissions.admittime) BETWEEN datetime(T2.charttime) AND datetime(T2.charttime,'+2 month') )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.subject_id,
    T1.charttime AS diagnosis_time
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd T1
JOIN 
    admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = 'K53' AND 
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100';

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'thrombocytopenia, unspecified' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'chronic airway obstruction, not elsewhere classified' ) ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS patient_count
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd AS T1
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'thrombocytopenia, unspecified')
    AND T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'chronic airway obstruction, not elsewhere classified');

In 2100, what are the four frequently ordered medications for patients in their 40s?

chosen.content: SELECT T1.drug FROM ( SELECT prescriptions.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 ) AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' GROUP BY prescriptions.drug ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 4

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', prescriptions.starttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime 
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 4;

Throughout this year, what are the top five most common drugs prescribed during the same hospital encounter to female patients aged 50s after being diagnosed with epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable, without status epilepticus?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable, without status epilepticus' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE admissions.subject_id IN ( SELECT patients.subject_id FROM patients WHERE patients.gender = 'f' ) AND admissions.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 AND datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH PatientDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
        pr.drug,
        pr.starttime AS prescription_time
    FROM 
        patients p
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd d ON a.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.gender = 'F'
        AND p.age BETWEEN 50 AND 59
        AND d.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable, without status epilepticus')
        AND strftime('%Y', d.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now') -- Current year
        AND pr.starttime > d.charttime
),
RankedDrugsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS drug_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        PatientDiagnosisCTE
    GROUP BY 
        drug
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugsCTE
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

How many patients since 1 year ago underwent a blood (ebv) test?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT admissions.subject_id ) FROM admissions WHERE admissions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT microbiologyevents.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents WHERE microbiologyevents.spec_type_desc = 'blood (ebv)' AND datetime(microbiologyevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') )

WHERE 
    T1.spec_type_desc = 'blood (ebv)'

    datetime(T1.charttime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year');

What percentile is a magnesium value of 2.0 among patients of the same age as patient 10037975 on their first hospital visit?

chosen.content: SELECT DISTINCT T1.C1 FROM ( SELECT labevents.valuenum, PERCENT_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY labevents.valuenum ) AS C1 FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'magnesium' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age = ( SELECT admissions.age FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10037975 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) ) AS T1 WHERE T1.valuenum = 2.0

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY T1.valuenum) AS C1
FROM (
    SELECT 
        labevents.valuenum
    FROM 
        labevents
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems ON labevents.itemid = d_labitems.itemid
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON labevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        d_labitems.label = 'magnesium'
        AND admissions.age = (
            SELECT 
                admissions.age
            FROM 
                admissions
            WHERE 
                admissions.subject_id = 10037975
                AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY 
                admissions.admittime ASC
            LIMIT 1
        )
) AS T1
WHERE 
    T1.valuenum = 2.0;

ORDER BY

LIMIT 3;

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', diagnoses_icd.charttime) ) FROM diagnoses_icd WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hyperosmolality and/or hypernatremia' ) AND diagnoses_icd.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10004733 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) ORDER BY diagnoses_icd.charttime DESC LIMIT 1

        SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code

        WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hyperosmolality and/or hypernatremia'

LIMIT 1;

List the top three most frequent lab tests that patients were given in the same hospital visit after being diagnosed with dysphonia in 2100.

chosen.content: SELECT d_labitems.label FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.itemid IN ( SELECT T3.itemid FROM ( SELECT T2.itemid, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'dysphonia' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, labevents.itemid, labevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM labevents JOIN admissions ON labevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',labevents.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.itemid ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH RankedLabTests AS (
    SELECT 
        T3.label,
        COUNT(*) AS test_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems T3 ON T2.itemid = T3.itemid
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'dysphonia')
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100'
        AND T1.charttime < T2.charttime
    GROUP BY 
        T3.label
)
SELECT 
    label
FROM 
    RankedLabTests
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

        p.starttime AS last_prescription_time

    WHERE 
        a.subject_id = 10018081

)

What were the top five microbiology tests most frequently performed since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T1.test_name FROM ( SELECT microbiologyevents.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM microbiologyevents WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100' GROUP BY microbiologyevents.test_name ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH MicrobiologicalTestsCTE AS (
    -- Step 1: Filter records where the year of charttime is 2100 or later
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        COUNT(*) AS test_count
    FROM 
        microbiologyevents
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y', charttime) >= '2100'
    GROUP BY 
        test_name
),
RankedMicrobiologicalTestsCTE AS (
    -- Step 2: Rank the tests based on their frequency in descending order
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        test_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY test_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        MicrobiologicalTestsCTE
)
-- Step 3: Select the top five tests based on their rank
SELECT 
    test_name
FROM 
    RankedMicrobiologicalTestsCTE
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

Among patients who received partial hepatectomy since 1 year ago, what are the top three most common diagnoses that followed afterwards within 2 months?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'partial hepatectomy' ) AND datetime(procedures_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH PartialHepatectomyProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.charttime AS procedure_charttime
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'Partial Hepatectomy'
        AND p.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
),
DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        d.subject_id,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses dd ON d.icd_code = dd.icd_code
    WHERE 
        d.charttime >= DATE('now', '-1 year')
),
FilteredDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        pp.subject_id,
        pp.procedure_charttime,
        dp.icd_code,
        dp.diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        PartialHepatectomyProcedures pp
    INNER JOIN 
        DiagnosedPatients dp ON pp.subject_id = dp.subject_id
    WHERE 
        pp.procedure_charttime < dp.diagnosis_charttime
        AND dp.diagnosis_charttime BETWEEN pp.procedure_charttime AND DATE(pp.procedure_charttime, '+2 month')
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        fd.icd_code,
        dd.long_title,
        COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        FilteredDiagnoses fd
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses dd ON fd.icd_code = dd.icd_code
    GROUP BY 
        fd.icd_code, dd.long_title
)
SELECT 
    long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

What was patient 10015272's first SpO2 since 203 days ago?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10015272 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-203 day') AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10015272 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime) >= datetime(current_time,'-203 day') ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 )

    chartevents.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Is respiratory rate of patient 10000032 last measured on the first ICU visit greater than the first value measured on the first ICU visit?

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10000032 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10000032 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) > ( SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10000032 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10000032 ) AND icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY icustays.intime ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'respiratory rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 ) )

WITH FirstICUStay AS (
    SELECT 
        icustays.stay_id
    FROM 
        icustays
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        admissions.subject_id = 10000032
    ORDER BY 
        icustays.intime ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
RespiratoryRates AS (
    SELECT 
        chartevents.charttime,
        chartevents.valuenum
    FROM 
        chartevents
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items ON chartevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
    WHERE 
        chartevents.stay_id IN (SELECT stay_id FROM FirstICUStay)
        AND d_items.label = 'respiratory rate'
    ORDER BY 
        chartevents.charttime
)
SELECT 
    MAX(valuenum) > MIN(valuenum) AS result
FROM 
    RespiratoryRates;

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10025612 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'heart rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.valuenum > 104.0 AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',chartevents.charttime) = '2100-10-03'

              AND ce.valuenum > 104.0
              AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ce.charttime) = '2100-10-03'
        ) THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS result;

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10020944 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'oral gastric' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) AND datetime(outputevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m-%d',outputevents.charttime) = '03-12'

    ad.subject_id = 10020944
    AND di.label = 'oral gastric'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', oe.charttime) = '2023-03-12';

What is the maximum total cost for a hospital that conducts a albumin, ascites lab test?

chosen.content: SELECT MAX(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(cost.cost) AS C1 FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT labevents.hadm_id FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'albumin, ascites' ) ) GROUP BY cost.hadm_id ) AS T1

    MAX(total_cost) AS max_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.hadm_id,
        SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        cost c
    INNER JOIN 
        labevents l ON c.hadm_id = l.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
    WHERE 
        dl.label = 'albumin, ascites'
    GROUP BY 
        c.hadm_id
);

Could you retrieve patient 10018081's daily weight? If multiple weights are measured daily, take the minimum.

chosen.content: SELECT MIN(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018081 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'daily weight' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d',chartevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MIN(chartevents.valuenum) AS min_weight,
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', chartevents.charttime) AS date
FROM 
    chartevents
WHERE 
    chartevents.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id
        FROM 
            icustays
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10018081
    )
AND 
    chartevents.itemid = (
        SELECT 
            d_items.itemid
        FROM 
            d_items
        WHERE 
            d_items.label = 'daily weight'
    )
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', chartevents.charttime);

When was patient 10018081's last maximum diastolic blood pressure on this month/30?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10018081 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure diastolic' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-0 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '30' ORDER BY chartevents.valuenum DESC, chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    chartevents.charttime
FROM 
    chartevents
WHERE 
    chartevents.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id
        FROM 
            icustays
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10018081
    )
AND 
    chartevents.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            d_items.itemid
        FROM 
            d_items
        WHERE 
            d_items.label = 'arterial blood pressure diastolic'
            AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents'
    )
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', chartevents.charttime) <= date('now', 'start of month', '+1 month', '-1 day')
ORDER BY 
    chartevents.valuenum DESC,
    chartevents.charttime DESC
LIMIT 1;

Find out the daily or urine output volume of patient 10019172 during the previous month. If multiple or urine output volumes are measured daily, take the minimum.

chosen.content: SELECT MIN(outputevents.value) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10019172 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'or urine' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) AND datetime(outputevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-1 month') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d',outputevents.charttime)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MIN(outputevents.value) AS min_output_volume,
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', outputevents.starttime) AS date
FROM 
    outputevents
JOIN 
    d_items ON outputevents.itemid = d_items.itemid
JOIN 
    icustays ON outputevents.stay_id = icustays.stay_id
JOIN 
    admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
WHERE 
    admissions.subject_id = 10019172
    AND d_items.label IN ('daily output', 'urine output')
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', outputevents.starttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-1 month')
GROUP BY 
    date;

What are the five most frequently prescribed medications for patients diagnosed with urethral stricture, unspecified previously within 2 months, this year?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'urethral stricture, unspecified' ) AND datetime(diagnoses_icd.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE datetime(prescriptions.starttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime,
        T2.drug,
        T2.starttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        prescriptions T2 ON T3.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE long_title = 'urethral stricture, unspecified')
        AND strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
),
RankedMedications AS (
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS prescription_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients
    WHERE 
        starttime BETWEEN charttime AND datetime(charttime, '+2 month')
    GROUP BY 
        drug
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedMedications
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

What is the 3-month survival rate for patients diagnosed with pleural effusion, not elsewhere classified.

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(C1) FROM ( SELECT ( CASE WHEN (strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime)) < 1 * 365/4 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'pleural effusion, not elsewhere classified' ) AND strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/4 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id )

rejected.content:
WITH PleuralEffusionDiagnosis AS (
    SELECT 
        d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code,
        d_icd_diagnoses.long_title
    FROM 
        d_icd_diagnoses
    WHERE 
        d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'Pleural effusion, not elsewhere classified'
),
SurvivalData AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime,
        T2.admittime,
        T3.dod,
        CASE 
            WHEN julianday(T3.dod) - julianday(T1.charttime) < 90 THEN 0 -- Deceased within 3 months
            ELSE 1 -- Still alive after 3 months
        END AS survived_3_months
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    LEFT JOIN 
        patients T3 ON T2.subject_id = T3.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.icd_code IN (SELECT icd_code FROM PleuralEffusionDiagnosis)
)
SELECT 
    AVG(survived_3_months) AS survival_rate
FROM 
    SurvivalData;

What are the three most frequently given microbiology tests for the patients who had previously received destruction of right main bronchus, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic within 2 months, since 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'destruction of right main bronchus, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic' ) AND strftime('%Y',procedures_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',microbiologyevents.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH PatientProcedures AS (
    SELECT p.subject_id, pr.charttime AS procedure_charttime
    FROM procedures_icd pr
    JOIN d_icd_procedures dp ON pr.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    JOIN admissions p ON pr.hadm_id = p.hadm_id
    WHERE dp.long_title = 'destruction of right main bronchus, via natural or artificial opening endoscopic'
      AND strftime('%Y', pr.charttime) = '2100'
),
MicrobiologicalTests AS (
    SELECT pp.subject_id, m.spec_type_desc, m.charttime AS test_charttime
    FROM PatientProcedures pp
    JOIN microbiologyevents m ON pp.subject_id = m.subject_id
    WHERE datetime(m.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(pp.procedure_charttime) AND datetime(pp.procedure_charttime, '+2 month')
),
TestCounts AS (
    SELECT spec_type_desc, COUNT(*) AS test_count,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM MicrobiologicalTests
    GROUP BY spec_type_desc
)
SELECT spec_type_desc
FROM TestCounts
WHERE rank <= 3;

What was the last height record for patient 10019777 since 01/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.valuenum FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10019777 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-01' AND chartevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10019777 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'height (cm)' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',chartevents.charttime) >= '2100-01' ORDER BY chartevents.charttime DESC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.valuenum AS last_height_recorded
FROM chartevents AS T1
INNER JOIN d_items AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE T1.subject_id = 10019777 
AND T2.label = 'Height'
AND T1.charttime >= '2100-01-01'
AND T1.charttime = (
    SELECT MAX(T3.charttime)
    FROM chartevents AS T3
    INNER JOIN d_items AS T4 ON T3.itemid = T4.itemid
    WHERE T3.subject_id = 10019777 
    AND T4.label = 'Height'
    AND T3.charttime >= '2100-01-01'
);

What was the average heart rate on last month/25 for patient 10007058?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(chartevents.valuenum) FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007058 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'heart rate' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-1 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '25'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(c.valuenum) AS avg_heart_rate
FROM 
    chartevents c
JOIN 
    d_items di ON c.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    c.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            i.stay_id 
        FROM 
            icustays i
        JOIN 
            admissions a ON i.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            a.subject_id = 10007058
    )
AND 
    di.label = 'heart rate'
AND 
    strftime('%d', c.charttime) = strftime('%d', 'now', '-1 month', '+25 days');

When was patient 10027602's first maximum pt in 12/this year?

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10027602 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'pt' ) AND datetime(labevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m',labevents.charttime) = '12' ORDER BY labevents.valuenum DESC, labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.charttime
FROM 
    labevents AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    d_labitems AS T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE 
    T1.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10027602
    )
AND 
    T2.label = 'pt'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now', '-0 year', '+11 months')
ORDER BY 
    T1.valuenum DESC, T1.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Calculate the total volume of mediastinal for patient 10005817 on 12/24/this year.

chosen.content: SELECT SUM(outputevents.value) FROM outputevents WHERE outputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10005817 ) ) AND outputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'mediastinal' AND d_items.linksto = 'outputevents' ) AND datetime(outputevents.charttime,'start of year') = datetime(current_time,'start of year','-0 year') AND strftime('%m-%d',outputevents.charttime) = '12-24'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    SUM(labevents.valuenum) AS total_volume
FROM 
    labevents
INNER JOIN 
    d_labitems ON labevents.itemid = d_labitems.itemid
WHERE 
    labevents.subject_id = 10005817
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', labevents.charttime) = '2023-12-24' -- Assuming 2023 as the current year
AND 
    d_labitems.label LIKE '%mediastinal%';

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.valuenum FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10005866 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'bilirubin, total' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',labevents.charttime) >= '2100-03' AND labevents.charttime = ( SELECT DISTINCT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10005866 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'bilirubin, total' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',labevents.charttime) >= '2100-03' ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1 )

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MIN(labevents.charttime) AS first_charttime,
    labevents.valuenum AS first_value
FROM 
    labevents
JOIN 
    d_labitems ON labevents.itemid = d_labitems.itemid
WHERE 
    labevents.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10005866
    )
AND 
    d_labitems.label = 'bilirubin, total'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m', labevents.charttime) >= '2100-03';

Among patients who received a other diagnostic procedures on lung or bronchus procedure , what were the three most frequent microbiology tests conducted during the same hospital encounter?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'other diagnostic procedures on lung or bronchus' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime, admissions.hadm_id FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureMicrobiologies AS (
    SELECT 
        m.test_name,
        COUNT(*) AS frequency
    FROM 
        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures dp ON p.icd_code = dp.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        microbiologyevents m ON a.hadm_id = m.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        dp.long_title = 'other diagnostic procedures on lung or bronchus'
    GROUP BY 
        m.test_name
),
RankedTests AS (
    SELECT 
        test_name,
        frequency,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY frequency DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ProcedureMicrobiologies
)
SELECT 
    test_name
FROM 
    RankedTests
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;
