Count the number of times patient 10021487 received replete with fiber (full) on this month/13.

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'replete with fiber (full)' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND datetime(inputevents.starttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-0 month') AND strftime('%d',inputevents.starttime) = '13'

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_replete_with_fiber_full_administrations
FROM 
    inputevents ie
JOIN 
    d_items di ON ie.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    ie.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id 
        FROM 
            icustays 
        JOIN 
            admissions a ON icustays.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            a.subject_id = 10021487
    )
AND 
    di.label = 'replete with fiber (full)'
AND 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', ie.starttime) BETWEEN strftime('%Y-%m-01', 'now') AND strftime('%Y-%m-13', 'now');

What is the average total hospital cost that includes a procedure called central venous catheter placement with guidance since 1 year ago?

chosen.content: SELECT AVG(T1.C1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(cost.cost) AS C1 FROM cost WHERE cost.hadm_id IN ( SELECT procedures_icd.hadm_id FROM procedures_icd WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'central venous catheter placement with guidance' ) ) AND datetime(cost.chargetime) >= datetime(current_time,'-1 year') GROUP BY cost.hadm_id ) AS T1

    AVG(total_cost) AS avg_total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.hadm_id,
        SUM(T1.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        cost AS T1
    INNER JOIN 
        procedures_icd AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        T2.icd_code = (SELECT icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE long_title = 'central venous catheter placement with guidance')
        AND datetime(T1.chargetime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year')
    GROUP BY 
        T1.hadm_id
) AS T;

Tell me the top three diagnoses with the highest 6-month mortality rate.

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T4.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T3.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY T3.C2 ASC ) AS C3 FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, AVG(C1) AS C2 FROM ( SELECT T1.icd_code, ( CASE WHEN strftime('%J',patients.dod) - strftime('%J',T1.charttime) < 1 * 365/2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) as C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= 1 * 365/2 GROUP BY admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code HAVING MIN(diagnoses_icd.charttime) = diagnoses_icd.charttime ) AS T1 JOIN patients ON T1.subject_id = patients.subject_id ) AS T2 GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 ) AS T4 WHERE T4.C3 <= 3 )

rejected.content:
WITH DiagnosisMortalityCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.icd_code,
        AVG(CASE 
            WHEN (julianday(T3.dod) - julianday(T1.charttime)) < 180 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS mortality_rate
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        patients T3 ON T2.subject_id = T3.subject_id
    GROUP BY 
        T1.icd_code
)

What were the five most common microbiology tests that patients had after undergoing esophagogastroduodenoscopy [egd] with closed biopsy within the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.test_name FROM ( SELECT T2.test_name, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, procedures_icd.charttime FROM procedures_icd JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code FROM d_icd_procedures WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'esophagogastroduodenoscopy [egd] with closed biopsy' ) ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, microbiologyevents.test_name, microbiologyevents.charttime FROM microbiologyevents JOIN admissions ON microbiologyevents.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T1.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') GROUP BY T2.test_name ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T3.test_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T2.test_name,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            procedures_icd.charttime AS procedure_time,
            diagnoses_icd.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
            microbiologyevents.test_name,
            microbiologyevents.charttime AS test_time
        FROM procedures_icd
        JOIN admissions ON procedures_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        JOIN diagnoses_icd ON admissions.hadm_id = diagnoses_icd.hadm_id
        JOIN microbiologyevents ON admissions.hadm_id = microbiologyevents.hadm_id
        WHERE procedures_icd.icd_code = (
            SELECT d_icd_procedures.icd_code 
            FROM d_icd_procedures 
            WHERE d_icd_procedures.long_title = 'esophagogastroduodenoscopy [egd] with closed biopsy'
        )
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', procedures_icd.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', diagnoses_icd.charttime)
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', microbiologyevents.charttime)
    ) AS T1
    JOIN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.subject_id,
            diagnoses_icd.charttime AS diagnosis_time,
            microbiologyevents.test_name,
            microbiologyevents.charttime AS test_time
        FROM diagnoses_icd
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        JOIN microbiologyevents ON admissions.hadm_id = microbiologyevents.hadm_id
        WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
            SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
            FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
            WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'other specified intestinal obstruction'
        )
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', microbiologyevents.charttime)
    ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id AND strftime('%Y-%m', T1.procedure_time) = strftime('%Y-%m', T2.diagnosis_time)
    GROUP BY T2.test_name
) AS T3
WHERE T3.C1 <= 5;

What was the first time patient 10040025 had the minimum platelet count value in 03/2100?

chosen.content: SELECT labevents.charttime FROM labevents WHERE labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10040025 ) AND labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'platelet count' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m',labevents.charttime) = '2100-03' ORDER BY labevents.valuenum ASC, labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    l.charttime AS first_charttime,
    l.valuenum AS min_platelet_count
FROM 
    labevents l
JOIN 
    admissions a ON l.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10040025
    AND dl.label = 'platelet count'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', l.charttime) = '2100-03'
ORDER BY 
    l.valuenum ASC, l.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Among patients in their 30s since 2100, what are the top three prescribed drugs?

chosen.content: SELECT T1.drug FROM ( SELECT prescriptions.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM prescriptions WHERE prescriptions.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 ) AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) >= '2100' GROUP BY prescriptions.drug ) AS T1 WHERE T1.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH PatientDiagnosisCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd d
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions p ON d.hadm_id = p.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.age BETWEEN 30 AND 39
        AND CAST(strftime('%Y', d.charttime) AS INTEGER) >= 2100
),
PrescriptionCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.subject_id,
        pr.drug,
        pr.starttime
    FROM 
        prescriptions pr
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions p ON pr.hadm_id = p.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.age BETWEEN 30 AND 39
        AND CAST(strftime('%Y', pr.starttime) AS INTEGER) >= 2100
),
RankedDrugsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        pd.subject_id,
        pd.icd_code,
        pd.charttime,
        pr.drug,
        pr.starttime,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pr.drug ORDER BY COUNT(pr.subject_id) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        PatientDiagnosisCTE pd
    INNER JOIN 
        PrescriptionCTE pr ON pd.subject_id = pr.subject_id
    WHERE 
        pd.charttime < pr.starttime
        AND datetime(pd.charttime, 'start of month') = datetime(pr.starttime, 'start of month')
    GROUP BY 
        pr.drug
)
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedDrugsCTE
WHERE 
    rank <= 3;

chosen.content: SELECT MAX(inputevents.totalamount) FROM inputevents WHERE inputevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10016810 ) ) AND inputevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'albumin 25%' AND d_items.linksto = 'inputevents' ) AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d',inputevents.starttime) >= '2100-07-02' GROUP BY strftime('%Y',inputevents.starttime)

    strftime('%Y', inputevents.starttime) AS year,

        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id
        FROM 
            icustays
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10016810
    )
AND 
    inputevents.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            d_items.itemid
        FROM 
            d_items
        WHERE 
            d_items.label = 'albumin 25%'
    )
AND

GROUP BY 
    year;

Since 2100, what are the top five most frequently given diagnoses that patients received within 2 months after being diagnosed with gout, unspecified?

chosen.content: SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.long_title FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code IN ( SELECT T3.icd_code FROM ( SELECT T2.icd_code, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'gout, unspecified' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.icd_code, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) >= '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE T1.charttime < T2.charttime AND datetime(T2.charttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime,'+2 month') GROUP BY T2.icd_code ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 5 )

    WHERE 
        dd.long_title = 'gout, unspecified'

),

    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,

        procedures_icd p
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures pd ON p.icd_code = pd.icd_code
    WHERE 
        pd.long_title LIKE '%gout%'
        AND strftime('%Y', p.charttime) >= '2100'
),
RankedDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        gd.icd_code,
        COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        GoutDiagnoses gd
    INNER JOIN 
        Procedures p ON gd.subject_id = p.subject_id
    WHERE 
        datetime(gd.diagnosis_time) BETWEEN datetime(p.procedure_time) AND datetime(p.procedure_time, '+2 month')
    GROUP BY 
        gd.icd_code
)
SELECT 
    dd.long_title
FROM 
    RankedDiagnoses rd
INNER JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses dd ON rd.icd_code = dd.icd_code
WHERE 
    rd.rank <= 5;

chosen.content: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T1.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hypospadias' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 ) - ( SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T2.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hypospadias' ) AND strftime('%Y',diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 JOIN admissions ON T2.subject_id = admissions.subject_id WHERE T2.charttime < admissions.admittime AND strftime('%Y',admissions.admittime) = '2100' AND datetime(admissions.admittime) BETWEEN datetime(T2.charttime) AND datetime(T2.charttime,'+2 month') )

     INNER JOIN 
        admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
     WHERE 
        diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
                                 FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
                                 WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'hypospadias') 
        AND strftime('%Y', diagnoses_icd.charttime) = '2100'
    ) AS T1
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        admissions.subject_id, 
        diagnoses_icd.charttime
     FROM 
        diagnoses_icd
     INNER JOIN

ON

What is the number of patients who died after diagnosis of alcoholic cirrhosis of liver within the same month?

chosen.content: SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT T2.subject_id ) FROM ( SELECT T1.subject_id, T1.charttime FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime FROM diagnoses_icd JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = ( SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code FROM d_icd_diagnoses WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'alcoholic cirrhosis of liver' ) ) AS T1 GROUP BY T1.subject_id HAVING MIN(T1.charttime) = T1.charttime ) AS T2 JOIN ( SELECT patients.subject_id, admissions.hadm_id, patients.dod FROM admissions join patients ON patients.subject_id = admissions.subject_id WHERE patients.dod IS NOT NULL ) as T3 ON T2.subject_id = T3.subject_id WHERE datetime(T2.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(T3.dod,'start of month')

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.subject_id,
    T1.charttime AS diagnosis_time
FROM 
    diagnoses_icd T1
JOIN 
    admissions T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    T1.icd_code = 'K70'
AND 
    strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = '2100';

When was patient 10021938's SpO2 the first time measured greater than 95.0 on last month/02?

chosen.content: SELECT chartevents.charttime FROM chartevents WHERE chartevents.stay_id IN ( SELECT icustays.stay_id FROM icustays WHERE icustays.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021938 ) ) AND chartevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_items.itemid FROM d_items WHERE d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry' AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents' ) AND chartevents.valuenum > 95.0 AND datetime(chartevents.charttime,'start of month') = datetime(current_time,'start of month','-1 month') AND strftime('%d',chartevents.charttime) = '02' ORDER BY chartevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    chartevents.charttime
FROM 
    chartevents
WHERE 
    chartevents.stay_id IN (
        SELECT 
            icustays.stay_id
        FROM 
            icustays
        INNER JOIN 
            admissions ON icustays.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10021938
    )
AND 
    chartevents.itemid = (
        SELECT 
            d_items.itemid
        FROM 
            d_items
        WHERE 
            d_items.label = 'o2 saturation pulseoxymetry'
            AND d_items.linksto = 'chartevents'
    )
AND 
    chartevents.valuenum > 95.0
AND 
    DATE(chartevents.charttime) = DATE('now', '-1 month', '+2 days')
ORDER BY 
    chartevents.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

Calculate the length of stay in days for patient 10007928's last hospital stay.

chosen.content: SELECT strftime('%J',admissions.dischtime) - strftime('%J',admissions.admittime) FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10007928 AND admissions.dischtime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY admissions.admittime DESC LIMIT 1

    icustays

    icustays.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            admissions.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions 
        WHERE 
            admissions.subject_id = 10007928
    )
AND 
    icustays.outtime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    icustays.intime DESC
LIMIT 1;

Among those who were prescribed with pseudoephedrine, what are the three most commonly prescribed drugs at the same time in 2100?

chosen.content: SELECT T3.drug FROM ( SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS C1 FROM ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE prescriptions.drug = 'pseudoephedrine' AND strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' ) AS T1 JOIN ( SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime FROM prescriptions JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id WHERE strftime('%Y',prescriptions.starttime) = '2100' ) AS T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id WHERE datetime(T1.starttime) = datetime(T2.starttime) GROUP BY T2.drug ) AS T3 WHERE T3.C1 <= 3

rejected.content:
WITH pseudoephedrine_patients AS (
    -- Find patients who were prescribed pseudoephedrine in 2100
    SELECT DISTINCT p.subject_id, p.hadm_id
    FROM prescriptions p
    INNER JOIN admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    WHERE p.drug = 'pseudoephedrine'
      AND strftime('%Y', p.starttime) = '2100'
),
other_drugs AS (
    -- Find other drugs prescribed to these patients in the same hospital encounter
    SELECT p.drug, COUNT(*) as count
    FROM prescriptions p
    INNER JOIN pseudoephedrine_patients pp ON p.subject_id = pp.subject_id AND p.hadm_id = pp.hadm_id
    WHERE p.drug != 'pseudoephedrine'
      AND strftime('%Y', p.starttime) = '2100'
    GROUP BY p.drug
),
ranked_drugs AS (
    -- Rank the drugs based on their frequency
    SELECT drug, count,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY count DESC) as rank
    FROM other_drugs
)
-- Select the top three drugs
SELECT drug
FROM ranked_drugs
WHERE rank <= 3;

chosen.content: SELECT 24 * ( strftime('%J',current_time) - strftime('%J', labevents.charttime) ) FROM labevents WHERE labevents.itemid IN ( SELECT d_labitems.itemid FROM d_labitems WHERE d_labitems.label = 'free calcium' ) AND labevents.hadm_id IN ( SELECT admissions.hadm_id FROM admissions WHERE admissions.subject_id = 10021487 AND admissions.dischtime IS NULL ) ORDER BY labevents.charttime ASC LIMIT 1

            itemid

            d_labitems 
        WHERE 
            label = 'free calcium'
    )

What is the average period of delay between appointments in the nephrology department?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH NephrologyTransfers AS (
    SELECT 
        t.subject_id,
        t.intime,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.subject_id ORDER BY t.intime) as rn
    FROM transfers t
    INNER JOIN admissions a ON t.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    WHERE t.careunit = 'nephrology'
),
TransferDelays AS (
    SELECT 
        nt1.subject_id,
        nt1.intime AS start_time,
        nt2.intime AS end_time,
        julianday(nt2.intime) - julianday(nt1.intime) AS delay_days
    FROM NephrologyTransfers nt1
    LEFT JOIN NephrologyTransfers nt2 ON nt1.subject_id = nt2.subject_id AND nt1.rn + 1 = nt2.rn
)
SELECT AVG(delay_days) AS avg_delay_days
FROM TransferDelays;

    AVG(24 * (strftime('%J', 'now') - strftime('%J', t.intime))) AS avg_delay_hours
FROM

    a.dischtime IS NULL

What is the residency status of the patient with the longest hospital stay?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH 
    -- Calculate the length of each hospital stay
    StayLengths AS (
        SELECT 
            subject_id,
            julianday(dischtime) - julianday(admittime) AS stay_length
        FROM 
            admissions
        WHERE 
            dischtime IS NOT NULL
    ),
    
    -- Rank stays by length for each patient
    RankedStays AS (
        SELECT 
            subject_id,
            stay_length,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY subject_id ORDER BY stay_length DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            StayLengths
    ),
    
    -- Select the longest stay for each patient
    LongestStay AS (
        SELECT 
            subject_id,
            stay_length
        FROM 
            RankedStays
        WHERE 
            rank = 1
    ),
    
    -- Find the patient with the longest overall stay
    LongestOverallStay AS (
        SELECT 
            subject_id,
            stay_length
        FROM 
            LongestStay
        ORDER BY 
            stay_length DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )

What is the average age of the patients with minimum humidity over 30 percent?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH MinHumidityCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        L.subject_id,
        MIN(L.valuenum) AS min_humidity
    FROM 
        labevents L
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems D ON L.itemid = D.itemid
    WHERE 
        D.label = 'humidity' AND L.valuenum > 30
    GROUP BY 
        L.subject_id
),
FilteredPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        A.age
    FROM 
        MinHumidityCTE M
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions A ON M.subject_id = A.subject_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(age) AS avg_age
FROM 
    FilteredPatients;

Apply a non-linear regression model to predict the progression of patient health status using 'chartevents'.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH AggregatedData AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        hadm_id,
        stay_id,
        itemid,
        AVG(valuenum) AS avg_valuenum
    FROM 
        chartevents
    WHERE 
        valuenum > 50 AND
        charttime BETWEEN '2020-01-01' AND '2021-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, itemid
),
PredictedHealthStatus AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        hadm_id,
        stay_id,
        itemid,
        avg_valuenum,
        POWER(avg_valuenum, 2) + 3 * avg_valuenum + 2 AS predicted_health_status
    FROM 
        AggregatedData
)
SELECT 
    subject_id,
    hadm_id,
    stay_id,
    itemid,
    avg_valuenum,
    predicted_health_status
FROM 
    PredictedHealthStatus;

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    p.subject_id,
    p.gender,
    c.charttime AS consent_date,
    d.long_title AS procedure
FROM 
    chartevents c
JOIN 
    d_items i ON c.itemid = i.itemid
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd di ON c.subject_id = di.subject_id
JOIN 
    d_icd_procedures d ON di.icd_code = d.icd_code
JOIN 
    patients p ON c.subject_id = p.subject_id
WHERE 
    i.label = 'icu consent'
ORDER BY 
    c.charttime ASC
LIMIT 1;

What is the longest icu stay duration for a patient with an acuity score of 10?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH AcuityPatients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT T1.subject_id
    FROM admissions T1
    INNER JOIN inputevents T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN d_items T3 ON T2.itemid = T3.itemid
    WHERE T3.label = 'acuity (picc)'
),
ICUStayDuration AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.stay_id,
        CAST(strftime('%J', T2.outtime) - strftime('%J', T2.intime) AS REAL) AS duration_days
    FROM AcuityPatients T1
    INNER JOIN icustays T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
)
SELECT MAX(duration_days) AS longest_stay_duration
FROM ICUStayDuration;

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.charttime
FROM 
    cost AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    admissions AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

    AND strftime('%Y', T1.chargetime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
GROUP BY 
    T1.hadm_id
ORDER BY 
    SUM(T1.cost) DESC
LIMIT 1;

List all requesters who have ordered more than 1000 lab tests this year.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T1.subject_id,
    COUNT(T2.itemid) AS num_tests
FROM 
    admissions T1
INNER JOIN 
    labevents T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
WHERE 
    datetime(T2.charttime, 'start of year') = datetime('now', 'start of year', '-0 year')
GROUP BY 
    T1.subject_id
HAVING 
    COUNT(T2.itemid) > 1000;

SELECT 
    T1.subject_id,
    T1.test_count
FROM (
    SELECT

        subject_id
) AS T1
WHERE 
    T1.rank <= 5;

SELECT AVG(procedure_count) AS avg_procedures_per_physician
FROM (
    SELECT p.subject_id, COUNT(pr.procedure_id) AS procedure_count
    FROM procedures_icd pr
    JOIN admissions a ON pr.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    JOIN patients p ON a.subject_id = p.subject_id
    GROUP BY p.subject_id
);

What is the average difference in admission duration between patients whose procedure outcomes were all 'successful' and those whose outcomes were not?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH SuccessfulProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_procedures,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.long_title LIKE '%successful%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_procedures
    FROM patients p
    JOIN admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
    JOIN procedures_icd pi ON a.hadm_id = pi.hadm_id
    JOIN d_icd_procedures d ON pi.icd_code = d.icd_code
    GROUP BY p.subject_id
    HAVING total_procedures = successful_procedures
),

What are the most common distribution routes for drugs prescribed to patients aged 65 or older?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    p.route,
    COUNT(p.route) AS route_count
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN 
    patients pa ON a.subject_id = pa.subject_id
WHERE 
    pa.gender IS NOT NULL AND -- Assuming gender is always populated for valid records
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', pa.dod) AS INTEGER) >= 65
GROUP BY 
    p.route
ORDER BY 
    route_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

What is the difference in the average number of hospital visits per year for patients based on whether their first child is male or female?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH FirstChildGender AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.gender,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.subject_id ORDER BY p.row_id) as row_num
    FROM patients p
),
PatientVisits AS (
    SELECT 
        f.subject_id,
        f.gender,
        COUNT(a.hadm_id) as visit_count
    FROM FirstChildGender f
    LEFT JOIN admissions a ON f.subject_id = a.subject_id
    WHERE f.row_num = 1
    GROUP BY f.subject_id, f.gender
)
SELECT 
    gender,
    AVG(visit_count) as avg_visits_per_year
FROM PatientVisits
GROUP BY gender;

    );

What is the location of the hospital that admitted the most patients with diabetes?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH DiabetesPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.hadm_id
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T3 ON T2.icd_code = T3.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T3.long_title LIKE '%diabetes%'
),
AdmissionCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.admission_location,
        COUNT(DISTINCT T2.subject_id) AS patient_count
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        DiabetesPatients T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    GROUP BY 
        T1.admission_location
)
SELECT 
    admission_location
FROM 
    AdmissionCounts
ORDER BY 
    patient_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

Which antihistamine is prescribed the most?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT T1.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT drug, 
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM prescriptions
    WHERE drug LIKE '%antihistamine%'
    GROUP BY drug
) AS T1
WHERE T1.rank = 1;

    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'

JOIN 
    d_items di ON ie.itemid = di.itemid
WHERE 
    p.subject_id = 51858
    AND di.label = 'CT Scan Consent Form';

    COUNT(*) AS num_events,
    AVG(valuenum) AS avg_valuenum,
    MAX(valuenum) AS max_valuenum,
    MIN(valuenum) AS min_valuenum
FROM 
    chartevents
GROUP BY 
    itemid;

When does patient 15794 end his/her flu quarantine.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH PositiveFluTests AS (
    SELECT 
        l.subject_id,
        l.charttime AS test_date
    FROM 
        labevents l
    JOIN 
        d_labitems dl ON l.itemid = dl.itemid
    WHERE 
        dl.label LIKE '%flu%' AND l.valuenum > 0 AND l.subject_id = 15794
),
EarliestPositiveTest AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(test_date) AS earliest_test_date
    FROM 
        PositiveFluTests
)
SELECT 
    DATE(earliest_test_date, '+7 days') AS quarantine_end_date
FROM 
    EarliestPositiveTest;

Which primary physician has the highest patient mortality rate?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH PatientMortality AS (
    SELECT 
        A.subject_id,
        A.hadm_id,
        P.gender,
        P.dod,
        D.charttime,
        CASE 
            WHEN P.dod IS NOT NULL AND julianday(P.dod) - julianday(D.charttime) < 90 THEN 'Deceased'
            ELSE 'Alive'
        END AS mortality_status
    FROM admissions A
    INNER JOIN patients P ON A.subject_id = P.subject_id
    INNER JOIN diagnoses_icd D ON A.hadm_id = D.hadm_id
),
PhysicianMortalityRate AS (
    SELECT 
        A.hadm_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_patients,
        SUM(CASE WHEN PM.mortality_status = 'Deceased' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deceased_count,
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN PM.mortality_status = 'Deceased' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS mortality_rate
    FROM admissions A
    LEFT JOIN PatientMortality PM ON A.subject_id = PM.subject_id AND A.hadm_id = PM.hadm_id
    GROUP BY A.hadm_id
)
SELECT 
    PMR.hadm_id,
    PMR.total_patients,
    PMR.deceased_count,
    PMR.mortality_rate
FROM PhysicianMortalityRate PMR
ORDER BY PMR.mortality_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.subject_id) AS num_successful_procedures
FROM 
    procedures_icd p
JOIN 
    chartevents c ON p.hadm_id = c.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_items i ON p.icd_code = i.itemid
WHERE 
    c.valuenum = 'success'
    AND c.valueuom = 'outcome'
    AND strftime('%Y', c.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now');

Which type of care unit has the patient with the highest page count?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH PatientAdmissions AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.careunit,
        COUNT(T2.hadm_id) AS admission_count
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        transfers T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id
    GROUP BY 
        T1.subject_id, T2.careunit
),
MaxPageCountPatient AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        SUM(admission_count) AS total_admissions
    FROM 
        PatientAdmissions
    GROUP BY 
        subject_id
    ORDER BY 
        total_admissions DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    T1.careunit
FROM 
    PatientAdmissions T1
INNER JOIN 
    MaxPageCountPatient T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
ORDER BY 
    T1.admission_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

What is the average number of patients assigned to each healthcare worker who administers input medication?

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id)) OVER () AS avg_patients_per_healthcare_worker
FROM (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T2.hadm_id
    FROM 
        admissions T1
    INNER JOIN 
        inputevents T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.stay_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_items T2 ON T3.itemid = T2.itemid
    WHERE 
        T2.label = 'medication added'
) T1;

    WHERE admissions.subject_id = 369
);

What is the length of stay in the icu for the patient having the most standing tackles?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH StandingTackles AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        COUNT(*) AS tackle_count
    FROM 
        patients p
    JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
    JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd di ON a.hadm_id = di.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        di.icd_code = 'T48.0'
    GROUP BY 
        p.subject_id
),
MaxStandingTackles AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id
    FROM 
        StandingTackles
    ORDER BY 
        tackle_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    d_icd_diagnoses.long_title,
    COUNT(diagnoses_icd.icd_code) AS diagnosis_count
FROM 
    admissions
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd ON admissions.hadm_id = diagnoses_icd.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses ON diagnoses_icd.icd_code = d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code
WHERE 
    admissions.age >= 60
GROUP BY 
    diagnoses_icd.icd_code
ORDER BY 
    diagnosis_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

Which antihistamine is the most

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH AntihistaminesCTE AS (
    -- Filter and count occurrences of each antihistamine
    SELECT 
        drug,
        COUNT(*) AS num_prescriptions
    FROM 
        prescriptions
    WHERE 
        drug LIKE '%antihistamine%'
    GROUP BY 
        drug
),
RankedAntihistaminesCTE AS (
    -- Rank the antihistamines based on their frequency
    SELECT 
        drug,
        num_prescriptions,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY num_prescriptions DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        AntihistaminesCTE
)
-- Select the top-ranked antihistamine
SELECT 
    drug
FROM 
    RankedAntihistaminesCTE
WHERE 
    rank = 1;

What are the 10 most common side effects of clarithromycin??

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH ClarithromycinPrescriptions AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.hadm_id,
        p.charttime AS prescription_charttime
    FROM 
        prescriptions p
    INNER JOIN 
        admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        p.drug = 'clarithromycin'
),
DiagnosedPatients AS (
    SELECT 
        cp.subject_id,
        cp.hadm_id,
        cp.prescription_charttime,
        d.icd_code,
        d.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        ClarithromycinPrescriptions cp
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd d ON cp.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
    WHERE 
        d.charttime > cp.prescription_charttime
),
FilteredDiagnoses AS (
    SELECT 
        dp.subject_id,
        dp.hadm_id,
        dp.prescription_charttime,
        dp.diagnosis_charttime,
        di.long_title AS diagnosis_long_title
    FROM 
        DiagnosedPatients dp
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses di ON dp.icd_code = di.icd_code
    WHERE 
        di.long_title LIKE '%side effect%'
),
RankedSideEffects AS (
    SELECT 
        fd.diagnosis_long_title,
        COUNT(*) AS side_effect_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        FilteredDiagnoses fd
    GROUP BY 
        fd.diagnosis_long_title
)
SELECT 
    rse.diagnosis_long_title
FROM 
    RankedSideEffects rse
WHERE 
    rse.rank <= 10;

What medication is prescribed for the patients diagnosed with atrial fibrillation?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT DISTINCT T3.drug
FROM diagnoses_icd AS T1
JOIN d_icd_diagnoses AS T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
JOIN admissions AS T4 ON T1.hadm_id = T4.hadm_id
JOIN prescriptions AS T3 ON T4.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
WHERE T2.long_title = 'atrial fibrillation'
AND T1.charttime < T3.starttime;

What is the average time taken for appointments to be delayed in the obstetrics and gynecology department?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(julianday(t.intime) - julianday(d.charttime)) AS avg_delay_in_days
FROM 
    transfers t
JOIN 
    admissions a ON t.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd d ON a.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses dd ON d.icd_code = dd.icd_code
WHERE 
    t.careunit = 'obstetrics and gynecology'
    AND dd.long_title = 'delayed delivery after artificial rupture of membranes, antepartum condition or complication'
    AND d.charttime < t.intime;

What can be prescribed for the hyposmolality patient?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    'Insulin' AS category,
    p.route AS route_of_administration
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10018081
    AND p.drug LIKE '%insulin%'
UNION
SELECT 
    'Isotonic Saline' AS category,
    p.route AS route_of_administration
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10018081
    AND p.drug LIKE '%isotonic saline%'
UNION
SELECT 
    'Hypertonic Saline' AS category,
    p.route AS route_of_administration
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10018081
    AND p.drug LIKE '%hypertonic saline%'
UNION
SELECT 
    'Antibiotics' AS category,
    p.route AS route_of_administration
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
WHERE 
    a.subject_id = 10018081
    AND p.drug LIKE '%antibiotic%';

What are the top five requesters of hematology tests this year?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH HematologistRequests AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        COUNT(T1.itemid) AS request_count
    FROM 
        labevents T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_labitems T2 ON T1.itemid = T2.itemid
    WHERE 
        T2.label LIKE '%hematology%' AND
        strftime('%Y', T1.charttime) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
    GROUP BY 
        T1.subject_id
),
RankedRequests AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        request_count,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY request_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        HematologistRequests
)
SELECT 
    subject_id
FROM 
    RankedRequests
WHERE 
    rank <= 5;

Can you tell me what the drug can be prescribed for patients with esoph varice oth dis nos?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT T3.drug 
FROM (
    SELECT T2.drug, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1 
    FROM (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, diagnoses_icd.charttime 
        FROM diagnoses_icd 
        JOIN admissions ON diagnoses_icd.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE diagnoses_icd.icd_code = (
            SELECT d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code 
            FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
            WHERE d_icd_diagnoses.long_title = 'esoph varice oth dis nos'
        )
    ) AS T1 
    JOIN (
        SELECT admissions.subject_id, prescriptions.drug, prescriptions.starttime 
        FROM prescriptions 
        JOIN admissions ON prescriptions.hadm_id = admissions.hadm_id 
        WHERE datetime(prescriptions.starttime) >= datetime('now', '-1 year')
    ) AS T2 
    ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id 
    WHERE T1.charttime < T2.starttime AND datetime(T2.starttime) BETWEEN datetime(T1.charttime) AND datetime(T1.charttime, '+2 month')
    GROUP BY T2.drug
) AS T3 
WHERE T3.C1 <= 4;

How do care unit choices in icus affect patient outcomes?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH PatientICUStay AS (
    SELECT 
        a.subject_id,
        i.careunit,
        c.charttime,
        c.valuenum
    FROM admissions a
    JOIN icustays i ON a.hadm_id = i.hadm_id
    JOIN chartevents c ON i.stay_id = c.stay_id
    JOIN d_items d ON c.itemid = d.itemid
    WHERE d.itemid = 123 -- Assuming 123 is the itemid for the outcome measurement
),
FirstLastICUVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        subject_id,
        careunit,
        MIN(charttime) AS first_charttime,
        MAX(charttime) AS last_charttime
    FROM PatientICUStay
    GROUP BY subject_id, careunit
),
OutcomeMeasurements AS (
    SELECT 
        p.subject_id,
        p.careunit,
        p.charttime,
        p.valuenum,
        f.first_charttime,
        f.last_charttime
    FROM PatientICUStay p
    JOIN FirstLastICUVisit f ON p.subject_id = f.subject_id AND p.careunit = f.careunit
),
AverageOutcomes AS (
    SELECT 
        careunit,
        AVG(CASE WHEN charttime = first_charttime THEN valuenum END) AS avg_first_outcome,
        AVG(CASE WHEN charttime = last_charttime THEN valuenum END) AS avg_last_outcome
    FROM OutcomeMeasurements
    GROUP BY careunit
)
SELECT 
    careunit,
    avg_first_outcome,
    avg_last_outcome,
    (avg_last_outcome - avg_first_outcome) AS outcome_change
FROM AverageOutcomes;

Output exactly [ABSTAIN] — nothing else — when the question asks about information NOT derivable from the schema below. This includes: doctor or provider identities, family history, drug side effects or pharmacology, future or scheduled hospital visits, patient contact information, or any concept not represented by the tables and columns listed below.

Otherwise output only the SQL query with no explanation.

Database schema (EHRSQL-MIMIC-IV):
  patients(row_id, subject_id, gender, dod)
  admissions(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, admittime, dischtime, admission_type, admission_location, discharge_location, insurance, language, marital_status, age)
  d_icd_diagnoses(row_id, icd_code, long_title)
  d_icd_procedures(row_id, icd_code, long_title)
  d_labitems(row_id, itemid, label)
  d_items(row_id, itemid, label, abbreviation, linksto)
  diagnoses_icd(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, icd_code, charttime)
  procedures_icd(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, icd_code, charttime)
  labevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, itemid, charttime, valuenum, valueuom)
  chartevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, itemid, charttime, valuenum, valueuom)
  prescriptions(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, starttime, stoptime, drug, dose_val_rx, dose_unit_rx, route)
  icustays(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, first_careunit, last_careunit, intime, outtime)
  transfers(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, transfer_id, eventtype, careunit, intime, outtime)
  microbiologyevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, charttime, spec_type_desc, test_name, org_name)
  inputevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, starttime, itemid, totalamount, totalamountuom)
  outputevents(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, charttime, itemid, value, valueuom)
  cost(row_id, subject_id, hadm_id, event_type, event_id, chargetime, cost)
Foreign keys: admissions.subject_id→patients.subject_id | icustays.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | icustays.subject_id→patients.subject_id | diagnoses_icd.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | diagnoses_icd.icd_code=d_icd_diagnoses.icd_code | procedures_icd.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | procedures_icd.icd_code=d_icd_procedures.icd_code | labevents.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | labevents.itemid→d_labitems.itemid | prescriptions.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | chartevents.stay_id→icustays.stay_id | chartevents.itemid→d_items.itemid | microbiologyevents.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | inputevents.stay_id→icustays.stay_id | inputevents.itemid→d_items.itemid | outputevents.stay_id→icustays.stay_id | outputevents.itemid→d_items.itemid | cost.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id | transfers.hadm_id→admissions.hadm_id
Determine the most influential features for discharge location.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH FeatureCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        discharge_location,
        insurance,
        language,
        marital_status,
        admission_type,
        COUNT(*) as feature_count
    FROM admissions
    GROUP BY discharge_location, insurance, language, marital_status, admission_type
),
RankedFeatures AS (
    SELECT 
        discharge_location,
        insurance,
        language,
        marital_status,
        admission_type,
        feature_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY discharge_location ORDER BY feature_count DESC) as rank
    FROM FeatureCounts
)
SELECT 
    discharge_location,
    insurance,
    language,
    marital_status,
    admission_type,
    feature_count
FROM RankedFeatures
WHERE rank = 1;

FROM admissions AS T1
INNER JOIN icustays AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.hadm_id

Identify 10 crucial factors influencing lab tests.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    d_labitems.label
FROM 
    d_labitems
WHERE 
    d_labitems.itemid IN (
        SELECT 
            T1.itemid
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                labevents.itemid,
                DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS C1
            FROM 
                labevents
            GROUP BY 
                labevents.itemid
        ) AS T1
        WHERE 
            T1.C1 <= 10
    );

Look up the latest technology used in curing atrial fibrillation.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH AtrialFibrillationDiagnosis AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS diagnosis_charttime
    FROM 
        diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE 
        T2.long_title = 'Atrial Fibrillation'
),
LatestProcedures AS (
    SELECT 
        T1.subject_id,
        T1.charttime AS procedure_charttime,
        T2.icd_code,
        T3.long_title AS procedure_description,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T1.subject_id ORDER BY T1.charttime DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        procedures_icd T1
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    INNER JOIN 
        AtrialFibrillationDiagnosis T3D ON T1.subject_id = T3D.subject_id
    WHERE 
        T1.charttime > T3D.diagnosis_charttime
)
SELECT 
    procedure_description
FROM 
    LatestProcedures
WHERE 
    rank = 1;

What month of the year is prescribed for the most antihistamines?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH AntihistaminePrescriptions AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', starttime) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS num_prescriptions
    FROM 
        prescriptions
    WHERE 
        drug LIKE '%antihistamine%'
    GROUP BY 
        month
),
RankedMonths AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        num_prescriptions,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY num_prescriptions DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        AntihistaminePrescriptions
)
SELECT 
    month
FROM 
    RankedMonths
WHERE 
    rank = 1;

WHERE a.admission_type = 'Temporary Resident';

What are the most frequently prescribed drug colors for patients over 60?

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    p.drug,
    COUNT(p.drug) AS frequency
FROM 
    prescriptions p
JOIN

GROUP BY 
    p.drug
ORDER BY 
    frequency DESC
LIMIT 5;

    T2.age > 60 AND T1.itemid = 12345 -- Assuming itemid 12345 corresponds to the password entry
GROUP BY 
    T1.valueuom
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T2.subject_id) > 2;

        SELECT 
            di.itemid 
        FROM 
            d_items di 
        WHERE 
            di.label LIKE '%medication%'
    )
AND 
    ic.hadm_id IN (
        SELECT 
            ad.hadm_id 
        FROM 
            admissions ad 
        WHERE 
            ad.subject_id = 10001
    );

What are the most common procedure outcomes for patients based on their admission locations?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH ProcedureOutcomesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        a.admission_location,
        p.long_title AS procedure_outcome,
        COUNT(*) AS outcome_count
    FROM 
        admissions a
    INNER JOIN 
        procedures_icd pr ON a.hadm_id = pr.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_procedures p ON pr.icd_code = p.icd_code
    GROUP BY 
        a.admission_location, p.long_title
),
RankedProcedureOutcomesCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        admission_location,
        procedure_outcome,
        outcome_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY admission_location ORDER BY outcome_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        ProcedureOutcomesCTE
)
SELECT 
    admission_location,
    procedure_outcome,
    outcome_count
FROM 
    RankedProcedureOutcomesCTE
WHERE 
    rank = 1;

What is the average billing amount for patients with heart disease this month?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    AVG(total_cost) AS avg_billing_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.subject_id,
        SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM 
        cost c
    INNER JOIN 
        diagnoses_icd di ON c.hadm_id = di.hadm_id
    INNER JOIN 
        d_icd_diagnoses d ON di.icd_code = d.icd_code
    WHERE 
        d.long_title LIKE '%heart disease%' 
        AND strftime('%Y-%m', di.charttime) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')
    GROUP BY 
        c.subject_id
);

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id) AS num_patients_with_consent_on_holiday

WHERE 
    T3.label LIKE '%consent%'

List the medications prescribed to patients with a male first child.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT DISTINCT p.drug
FROM prescriptions p
JOIN admissions a ON p.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN diagnoses_icd d ON a.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
WHERE d.icd_code = (
    SELECT icd_code 
    FROM d_icd_diagnoses 
    WHERE long_title = 'Male first child'
)
AND a.subject_id IN (
    SELECT subject_id 
    FROM patients 
    WHERE gender = 'M'
);

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    T2.label AS side_effect,
    COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM 
    prescriptions AS T1
JOIN 
    labevents AS T3 ON T1.hadm_id = T3.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_labitems AS T2 ON T3.itemid = T2.itemid
WHERE 
    T1.drug = 'thiamine hcl'
GROUP BY 
    T2.label
ORDER BY 
    frequency DESC
LIMIT 10;

Identify the most common organism associated with poor specimen quality in microbiology tests.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH PoorSpecimenQualityCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        org_name,
        COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
    FROM 
        microbiologyevents
    WHERE 
        spec_type_desc = 'Poor Specimen Quality'
    GROUP BY 
        org_name
),
RankedOrganismsCTE AS (
    SELECT 
        org_name,
        occurrence_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        PoorSpecimenQualityCTE
)
SELECT 
    org_name
FROM 
    RankedOrganismsCTE
WHERE 
    rank = 1;

What medication should be prescribed to patients with glaucoma nos?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
WITH GlaucomaPatients AS (
    SELECT T1.subject_id
    FROM diagnoses_icd T1
    INNER JOIN d_icd_diagnoses T2 ON T1.icd_code = T2.icd_code
    WHERE T2.long_title = 'glaucoma nos'
),
PrescribedMedications AS (
    SELECT T2.drug
    FROM GlaucomaPatients T1
    INNER JOIN prescriptions T2 ON T1.subject_id = T2.subject_id
),
RankedMedications AS (
    SELECT drug,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank
    FROM PrescribedMedications
    GROUP BY drug
)
SELECT drug
FROM RankedMedications
WHERE rank <= 5;

What is the maximum number of standing tackles made by the patients older than 45 and married?

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    MAX(COUNT(DISTINCT T1.subject_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY strftime('%Y', T2.charttime)) AS max_standing_tackles_per_year
FROM 
    admissions AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    chartevents AS T2 ON T1.hadm_id = T2.stay_id
INNER JOIN 
    d_items AS T3 ON T2.itemid = T3.itemid
WHERE 
    T1.age > 45 AND T1.marital_status = 'married' AND T3.label = 'standing tackle'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y', T2.charttime);

When does patient 370 end his/her flu quarantine.

chosen.content: [ABSTAIN]

rejected.content:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m-%d', d.charttime, '+7 days') AS quarantine_end_date
FROM 
    patients p
JOIN 
    admissions a ON p.subject_id = a.subject_id
JOIN 
    diagnoses_icd d ON a.hadm_id = d.hadm_id
JOIN 
    d_icd_diagnoses dicd ON d.icd_code = dicd.icd_code
WHERE 
    p.subject_id = 370
    AND dicd.long_title LIKE '%flu%';
